pericopes.title: Chihna hoi jeh a kipamau kipe
Thaset jeh le Jousei jeh a Gihsalna
Chihna hol ding Ngolna dalhah ding
Hinkho chung chang le chonchan dol’a Thuchih kiseiho

chapters.text: Israel leng David chapa Solomon thuchih seidoh ho:
Mihemten chihna le hilchahna ahet theiya Thu kiseiho hi ipi kiseina ham, ti ahet thieina dia
Aphalam adihlama kihilchahna kisan’a, Adih le thudih chule akitoh a kisan ding ahi;
Chutileh milham jeng jong Lungthim chingtah a um’uva, Khangdong ho jeng jong hi Hetna le thil datkhenje them diu ahi.
Michingin jong kho ajah a thepna aholbe thei, Hetkhenna nei mihemin jong khut themna aholbe thei ahi.
Chutia chu thuchih kiseile Thil kigondol ahetdoh theiya Miching ho thuseiho leh Thulem aseijouseu ahetdoh ding ahi.
Pakai gin kiti hi hetna bulpi kipatna ahin, Mi ngol hon vang chihna le hilchahna asang pouve.
Kachapa, napan nahilna ngaiphan lang, Nanun nahilna jong paimang din gotdan;
Ajeh chu ama nin nahilna chengse chu Nalua delkop pah-leh banga naki-kop’a Na-ngong changa Khivui ki-oh banga naki-o ding ahi.
Kachapa, michonseten jol lhah dia nagot tengu leh Athu’uva nun ding go hih hel’in.
Amahon najah a aseiyuva, “Hungin kilhonu hitin mi thisan so din ngah-u hite; Themmona beihel miho jong chu Inop igot’a bol din chang lhiu hite;
Ahing laiyuva noimigamin aval lhuma abahgam bangin Eihon jong amaho khu bahgamu hite; Kokhuh sunga lhalutsa ho bangin Apum pum’uvin val lhum jengu hite.
Chutileh thil manlu tah tah jong ikilah jeng diu, Mi thilkeo kichomdoh ho chu insung dima ikikoi diu ahi.
Keiho lah-a vang hung kisanin lang, Sumdip khat kikop’in sum khol khomu hite,” atiu jongleh,
Kachapa, amaho khutoh lampi khat jot khom hih-in, Amaho lamlhah dunga konin nakengphang nung chonin;
Ajeh chu thilse lama akeng jang khaiyun, Hetman lou louvin thisan asojiuvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh vachan amupet’a Lenpel kisonpeh kiti chu pannabei ahibouve.
Hiche miho jong hin amaho thisan so nadia Midang achan lhih jiu ahin, Athilona ding bep’uva Mi ana lamtin’uva achan lhih jiu ahibouve.
Pumhat jenga phatchomna holte lam-lhah chu hitobang bang hi ahimong nan, Thil neipaa apan vangun athilo bep jiuve.
Chihna hin kholai dunga o-thongje jun lhang asamin, Kailhang dunga jong a-ogin kithong hel’in apenge;
Palvum dunga jong chihna chu apeng-jahjengin, Khopi kelkot phung dunga jong thu aseijie.
“Vo milham ho, itih chanpi milham mai maiya um ding nadeiyu hiya, Midai thanga pang hon jong itih chan geiya mi nadai thang diu ham? Mi ngolten itih chan hetna nahot diu hitam?
Keiman mi kaphona hi ngai phauvin, Vetan, keiman nahenguva kalung gel twisuna kasun lhah khum ding nahiuve; Chutengleh keima thusei jouse hi Nang ho kahetsah ding nahiuve.
Ajeh chu keiman kakouvun Nang hon neihou pouve; Kakhut’in kahin sanguvin Koimachan jong i-eisah poi.
Guhthima kahilna abonchan nahsah louvin nakoiyun, Kaphosalna jouse jong khatcha nasang pouve.
Hamsetna nato tengu leh kenjong kanuisat diu, Manthah nan naphah tenguleh totna kanei diu nahi.

Khopi huiyin asem banga Manthah nan nahin phah uva, Chimpei kipei banga Hamsetna nato diuvin naphah tengu jongleh Hesoh le gentheina nasa tah chun a alhun khumu jongleh Khohsahna kaneipeh lou ding nahiuve.
Hijongleh amahon eihin kouvuva, Keiman kahou deh louhel ding, Lung gil tah a eihol hol diu, Eimudoh jou deh lou diu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh amahon hetna adei pouvin, Pakai ginje jong khohsah a kilhen din agel pouve.
Guhthima kahilna khatcha jong alapouvin, Kaphosalna jouse jong not thap in aneiyui.
Hijeh a chu amahon atohgau akineh diu, Thilse agon jouseu chu thaotwijol banga jolsoh diu ahi.
Ajeh chu amahon lampi ajot khel tenguleh Milhamho chu min athagamlo jin, Mi ngol ho kiletsahna chu Amaho sumanga pangji ahibouve.
Hijeh chun koi hijongleh Kasei ngai jouse chu lung monga cheng ding, Thilse ging louhel’a Mongtah a cheng jing ding ahi,” ati.
Kachapa, nangin kasei jouse nasan’a Kathupeh aboncha goukhol banga nakhol jinga,
Chihna thu lung lut’a na-ngai lhih jinga, Nalungthima thil hetkhen ding nakhohsah a ahileh;
Ahinai, thil kiselguh hetna dia lhang nasap jenga, Thil ketkhen theina dia o-thongje jua napen’a,
Dangka hol’a nahollea Gou kiselmang hol banga nahol thei leh
Pakai ginje nahetdoh ding, Pathen hetna namudoh ding ahitai.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin chihna apen, Akamsunga konin hetna le hetkhenna potdoh-e.
Milungdih din chihna phatah tah akholjin, Lungthim kehlouva lamjotte din lum’in apange;
Thu adih a tan ding jeng agel’in, Ami thengte lampi asempeh jingin ahi.
Hichea hi nangin adih le thu adih a kitan nahetdoh a Kitoh tah a lampi phalai jouse nahet ding ahi;
Ajeh chu nalung sunga chihna hung lut ding, Nahinkho dia jong hetna hi lung lhaina hi ding ahi.
Thil hetkhen them nan nachin jinga Hettoh nan nahontup jing jeng ding ahi.
Thilse lampia kona nahuhdoh jinga, Akaleh akalouva thusei mi tea kona nahuhdoh ding ahi.
Hitobang miho lungdih a chena lampi haiya; Muthim lampia che nomhoa konin;
Thilse bol ding jeng athanom’uvin, Chule a-eng alouva thilse bol ding kipa nan alauve.
Amaho hi alamlhah jouseu akon chet chut’in, Alampi jouse jong damun lama bol jeng ahiuve.
Numei phalouva kona jong nahoidoh thei ding, Mat chahna dia thu ngei ngei aseiya kona jong nahoidoh ding ahi;
Hitobang numei hin asen-gol adalhah a A-Pathen henga akitepna jong asuh-mil ahitai.
Hijeh chun amanu hi ainsung jeng jong thina lha lut ding ahitan, Alampi jouse jong damun lama akilhung lut’e.
Hiche numeinu koma vahlut jouse chu Koimacha hung kinungle kit louding, Amaho hin hinna lampi jouse chu Ahin jotkhah kit louhel diu ahitai.
Hijeh a chu nangma mipha ho lampia nache jinga, Midih ho lamlhah jouse najui jing ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh milungdih hon gam-sung alouva, Lungthim keh louhel ho chu gam-sunga cheng den diu ahi.
Migilou vang chu aboncha gamsunga kona Kisubei soh hel ding ahiuvin, Joule nal’a kilep ho chu Gamsunga kona abul abal’a kikaldoh ding ahiuve.
Kachapa, kahilna hi sumil hih hel’in, Kathupeh chengse hi nalungthim-in ching jingin;
Ajeh chu hiche kabilna ho hin Nahin nikho atamsah thei, nahin kumkho asotsah thei, Phattheina thalhingset’a Napeh thei ding ahiye.
Tahsan naumna le nakitahna chu lhaso hih hel’in, Hiche teni chu khivui-on ki-on lang, Abonchan nalung thima nalung changa chun Lekhajem kijih lut bangin jih lut’in.
Chutileh Pathen le mihem mu dinga Lung lhai nauma minpha namu ding ahi.
Nalungthim pumpin Pakai jeng tahsa-nin, Nangma chihna mai maiyin kisong hih-in.
Nache na lam lama Pakai jeng phong-doh-in, Chutileh aman nalampi jouse nasem-jangpeh ding ahi.
Nangma mitmun kichang chihsah dan, Pakai jeng gingin thilsea konin kihei mangjon.
Chutileh natahsa dia damtheina hintin, Nagu nachang jouse dia jong kido-dohna hiding ahi.
Nalousoh ga masa jouse leh nanei jouse Pakai jabol nan tohdoh jengin;
Chutengle nachang pang aboncha dim-soh a, Lengpithei twi nachilna mun jouse jong letsoh ding ahi.
Kachapa, Pakaiyin nagahna chu don-louvin koidan, Aman naphona jouse jong theichim-in nei hih hel’in;
Ijeh-inem itileh mipan akipapi achapa abolna banga Pakaiyin jong mi angailut chubou aphosal ji ahi.
Chihna le thil hetkhenna kimudoh mihem chu Anun nom ahitai;
Ajeh chu hichea phatchomna chu Dangkaa kona phatchomna sanga phachomjo ahin, Hichea kona akandoh kimu jong Sana sanga phachomjo nalai ahi.
Chihna hi sana pahcha jem sanga manlujo ahin, Hijeh chun nadeichat ito bang hijongle natethei lou ding ahibouve.
Hinkho sotna ding jong Chihna hin akhut jetlama akichoi ahin, Haona le kijabolna jong Akhut veilama akichoi jinge.
Chihna lampi chu lung lhaina jeng ahin. Alamlhah jouse jong chamna ahisoh hel’e.
Akituh khah chengse din Chihna hi hinna thingphung ahin, Chihna kikol chah jing ho chu Mi nun nom akiti tauve.
Pakaiyin chihna amana leiset aphudoh ahin, Thil ahetkhen theina jal’a vanmun jouse asemdoh ahi.
Pakai thil hettoh jeh a komtong jouse kisemdoh ahin, Meilhang jousen jong gotwi ahinphi lhah jiu ahi.
Kachapa, chihna phatah chingin Thil datkhenje them jingin, Namitmun hichengse jong hi Kitolmang sah hih hel’in.
Chihna le thil datkhen themna chu Nalhagao din jong hinjouna hintin. Natahsa ngong chang dung jenga jong Khivuiya kijepna banga nakijepna thei hiding ahi.
Chutileh lung mong tah a nalampia nachele ding, Nakengto jeng jong nachotnal thei lou ding ahi.
Touthim jongle chun nakichat lou ding, Lum jongle chun na-ihmut nom lheh ding ahi.
Photlot louva thi ding kicha hih hel’in. Migilouten mi asuhgam jeng diu jong ging hih-in.
Ajeh chu Pakaibou nakisonna hiding, Aman nakeng phang jong thangkol’a a-oh sah lou ding ahi.
Nathan ajo laisen nabolpeh thei chan din Thilpha bolpeh ding thase loujen in.
Na-inheng nagalveng jah a jong “Chen lang hung kit tan, Jing tengleh nape nange,” tin Naneisa san seipeh hih hel’in.
Na-inheng nagalveng ding Thilse ngaito dan; Ama chu nangma koma Nakisonpi tah a cheng ahibouve.
Ajeh beiyin mitoh kina hih-in, Aman imacha naloa nabolset lou pet chun.
Pumhat mang mihem chu thangset pi dan, Ache na lampi dungjong jui hih hel’in.
Ajeh chu Pakai dinga mi lamvai chu Thet umtah ahin, Milungdih vang chu Pakai jenga kisong ahinai.
Pakai gaosapna chu migilou inchunga achun, Midih chenna vang chu Pakaiyin phatthei aboh-e.
Mi noisete din Pakai chu mi noise tah ahin, Mi lung nengte vang a lung lhaipi lheh jie.
Michingin mihem jabolna akimua Mi ngol-ho vang vetda chang diu ahi.
Vo chapate, mipan nahilchah nau ngai phauvin, Asung thu nahetdoh-uva phatchomna naneina diuvin lung lut’in ngaiyun.
Ajeh chu keiman nang ho hi danpha kapeh nahiuvin, Hijeh chun kahilna sukeh hih-un.
Keima kapa dia chapa changkhat kahiya Kanu mitmua jong deile ngai kaum laiyin,
Kapan eihil’in kajah a hitin aseiye, “Kasei jouse hi nalungthimin kolchah jingin, Kathupeh chengse hi nit jingin Hin nan nei jengin;
Sumil loujenin, kakamsung soh kathuseihoa kon hin Kihei mang loujenin, chihna hol’in asung thu hen.
Chihna chu dalha hih-in, Chihna chun nangma nachin ding ahi; Chihna chu ngailun, Chihna chun nangma na-ngah nante.
Chihna bulpi akipatna chu hiche hi ahi; Chihna holdoh-in, Itobang chihna hijongleh, Naholdoh chan chu asung thu hethemin.
Chihna chu sang tah-in domsangin, Chutileh chih nan nangma nadop sang ding ahi. Chihna chu nakolchah jinga ahileh, Nangma hi chihnan ja tah a nabol ding ahi.
Chihna chun nalujanga delkop hoitah nakop peh’a, Lal lukhuh hoitah nakhuhpeh ding ahi,” ati.
Kachapa kasei ngaiyin lang, Kathupeh chengse kisanin; Chutileh nahinkho jong Kum tampi nahin ding ahi.
Keiman chihna lampi jong kahil tan, Adih a chonna lampi jousea jong kapuisoh tai.
Nava le tengjongleh nakalsotna nakipal lou ding, Lhai jongle chun nakise lhuh lou ding ahi.
Nakihil chahna chu lhaso louvin tuh chah jingin, Kihilna chu chingphan, hichu nahin na ahibouve.
Migiloute lampia valut dan lang, Mi engsete lamlena jong vahle hih-in.
Hiche lampi chu peldoh-in, asunga vahlut hih-in; Hiche lampia chun kihei mangin jotpai jengin.
Ajeh chu thil dihlou abol masah louvu leh, Amaho chu ihmu thei loudiu ahin, Midang khatbeh akipal lhuh sah lou uva ahileh, Amaho ihmu thei lou diu ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh amahon gitlouna ga akineh-u ahin, Pumhat’a thil aboljiu chu ju-dona adonu ahitai.
Midih ho lamlhah vang chu, Jingkah khovah hung vah abangin, Sunkim geiya nisa asat ham geiya asat bangin, Avah cheh avah cheh jengin achansel jenge.
Migiloute lamlhah vang muthim lhangkhal kiheh abangin, Ipipen chunga kipal lhu diu ham akihet tapouve.
Kachapa, kaseiho hi phatechan ngaiphan, Kathusei jouse hi ngaiyin lang nakol sung jingin.
Kaseiho hi namitmun kitolmang sah hih-in, Abonchan nalungthim sunga ching jing jengin.
Ajeh chu akimu dohpa dia kaseiho hi hinna ahin, Atahsa phe le vou jong adamsah thei hel ahi.
Nalungthimin khothe ngaigeh-in umin, Hichea kona hi hinna gui hung kijandohji ahi.
Thu alamjang lou nasei chu ngan lang, thu chavai houlimna naman jong chu nga jengin.
Na mit tenin mitchangin mi ven lang, Namaiya thil navetdol jong jangkei ding ahi.
Nakengto te nia nachotna ding lampi kivet phat’in, Chutileh nalamlhah jouse kichen thei ding ahi.
Jet lama jong veilama jong kiheile le hih-in, Thilsea konin nakengphang sep doh jengin chemangin.
Kachapa, keima chihna hi lung lut’in ngaiphan, Thil kahet khen theidol jong hi nakol sungin ngaiyin;
Chutileh thil datkhenje nathep’a, Nakamsunga hetna cheng jing ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh numei chonthang hoi chu Akamsung khoiju lhumin alhum jin, Athusei him him jong chu Thao kinu sangin jong analjo jie.
Ahinla achaina chu gamsai thingkhat bangin akhan, Hemto chemjam hemin ahem jie.
Akengphang te nin thina a apuilut jin, Noimigam langa akal asonlut paijin ahi.
Hiche numeinu hin hinna lampia che ding khoh asapon, Alampi jouse jong akaleh leh-in akilhungin, Ahivangin amanun Hiche ahilam chu akihet tapoi.
Hijeh chun tun chate kasei ngaiyuvin, Kakamsung soh thu kiseihoa kon hin potdoh hih-un.
Hiche numeinu chu gamla tah-in peldoh jengin, Akotpi phung nailama jong kithah hih hel’in;
Achutilouleh min najabolna hung beiyin tin, Nahinkho lhum keiya min nuhepithei lou ding ahi.
Nathahat’a nahaona aboncha gamdang min A-angjanga akipom’uva, Natohga jong aboncha Gamchom mite insunga kitol lut ding ahi.
Nahinkho akichai lam tengleh genthei hesoh nathoh a Natahsa naphe navou apumpia min abahgam diu ahi.
Chutengleh nangin jong naseiya, “Kigahna kiti hi iti kadeimo hita a, Kalungthima jong Mi phoding hi iti kahot hitam!
Kenvang eihil ho thusei jong ka ngaipon, Mi hilchah a pang ho thusei jong ka nan ka-ngaipoi.
Houbung kikhopna a chun Keima amangthah pai ding kahitai,” nati ding ahi.
Naluikhuh a hung putdoh twi, Na twikula hung longdoh twi chu kidon tan,
Nangma twinah dunga twiput chu gamtina kithesoh ding hiya, Kholai dung jousea jong twi long ding hinam?
Hicheho hi nang dingbou hisah-in lang, Nahenga hung kholjin maljin ho chansah dan.
Nangma twinah phung chu phatthei chang hen, Nang jong nasenji najinu chunga kipah jingin;

Najinu sajuh lhagol hoitah le sajuh chal hoitah banga, Phat jousen aman nahepina chu nachunga dimjing hen; Amanu anglumin nakipa thanomsah jing ahin, Soh banga nahen chah jing hi aman nalungsetna chu ahi.
Kachapa, ipi dinga numei chavai chu Nangin nakideipi ding hiya, Numei kamhat hen hun chu Ibol’a a-angsung nakoichah ding ham?
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin mihem lamlhah jouse ave lhi jingin, Ache na lam lam amelchih jing jenge.
Migilou chu athepmona chengsen akipalsah jin, Chonset natoh atohdoh hon amatji ahiye.
Hitobang mi chu kigahna beiyin athijin, A ngol behseh jeh-in amangthah jin ahi.
Kachapa, na-inheng nagalveng dia thilman a kitung nahiya, Hetphah lou mi dinga thilman dia kipedoh nahiya,
Nakamsung soh thuseiya kipal nahitah a, Nakamsunga naseisa nathu seihon nahel-oh ahileh
Hiche hi bol lechun Nang le nang beh nakihuhdoh ding ahi kachapa; Ijeh-inem itileh na-inheng nagalvengin Nachunga tha anei ahitan. Kinloi tah-in chen lang Na-inhengpa henga gatao loiyin.
Ihjong ihmut dan lang Namit teni jong kisinsah dan; Namit mul mitgeiya keh ho jong Kicholdo sah hih hel’in;
Sadelpa masanga sakhigol kihinso bangin Nang le nang kihuhdoh loiyin. Vacha delpa khut’a toldoh vacha bangin Nangle nang kihuhdoh loiyin.
Vo mi thase, chen lang sihmi khu gaven. Alamjot aumchan geltoh-in chih theinan neiyin.
Haosa bei vaibol bei Vaihom beihel’in jong
Sihmin nipi laiya aneh ding akikhol’in, Akivahna ding khal lhun teng apokhom theiye.
Vo mi thase, hikoma hi itih chan nalup lup ding ham? Nalupna a kona itih teng nahung thodoh ding ham?
Nakimoh jam jama, namoh lup lup’a, Nakhut chasah nom louva nanop uma ahileh
Vaichat nan kholjin vahvei banga nahinphah ding, Khutdo banga nahenga hung lut jeng ding ahi.
Pannabei mihem, migilou chu Thu chavai pou sei din avah len,
Amit teni asat lhap lhap jin, A tin ho chun akikhoi khoiyin, akhutjungin akoh jie.
Alungthima jouthu jeng agel’in, Thilse jeng agong gong jie; Tang louhel’in Kitomona ding jeng muchi tun atui.
Hijeh a chu achunga hetman louva hamsetna hung lhunga, Chomkah louva boldam mohel’a kinoigep ding ahi.
Pakaiyin ahotjing thil gup aumin, Pakai din thil sagi thet umtah cheh aume.
Hicheng chu kiletsahna mitvet, Thujou sei sei jeng leigui, Themmona bei thisan soa pang khut teni ahin,
Thilse jeng jeng ngaitoa lungthim, Thilse bol dia lhailoi kengphang teni,
Ajou jou seiya hettohsah a pang mi, Chule asopite lah a kitomona ding muchi tua tupa ahi.
Kachapa, napan thu napeh chu nit jingin, Nanun nahilna chu sumil hih hel’in.
Napa le nanun nahilna chu nalungthim in ching jingin, Na ngong changa khivui-on ki-on.
Nava le teng hiche ho chun nalamkai ding, Nalup teng jongleh nachinga pang diu ahi; Nahung khahlo teng jongleh Nihil’a pang kit diu ahinalaiye.
Ajeh chu thupeh hi thaomei tobang ahin, Kihilna jong hi thaomeivah tobang ahi; Kiphosal’a kigahna jouse jong hi Hinkho sunga kimanchah dol mong ahibouve.
Hicheng hin numei gilou nua kona nahoidoh a Akamhat kamthem nua kona nahoidoh ding ahi.
Amel-hoi khu nalungthim in deichat dan, Amit hei jong khu kilhep lhah sah datan.
Ijeh-inem itileh numei noti chu Changlhah pheng khat’a jong kichoh thei ahin, Ahivanginla pasalto jongji numei hin Pasalpa hinkho chu asuhmang hel ahitai.
Mihemin adipkonga mei-am akipoh theiya Aponsil chengse kavam louva akoi thei nah am?
Mihem chu song meihol kitih-am chunga vahlea Akengto akengphang jouse kalouva um theiyem?
Ainhengpa jinu jonpi pa jong chutobangma ahin, Ainhengpa jinu tongkha tapou talen man louva um thei lou ding ahi.
Agil kel teng duchat man’a thilgua pangji Gucha chu mihemten avetda cheh hilou ham?
Ijemtia gucha chu akimatdoh a ahileh Aguhjat chu ajat sagijen’a asah ding; Ainsunga anei athilkeo aboncha Aguh chatman a apeh ding ahijenge.
Mito jonbolpa chu alungthim bei ahin, Athilse bol chun ama le ama asuhmang ahi.
Min amavoa jachatna jong akimu ding. Min avetdana chu theh ngim mo hel’a um ding ahitai.
Ajeh chu thangset nan mihem khoh tah-in alunghan sah jin, Phulah abol teng khen anei louhel ding ahi.
Aman thilman akilah nom louhel ding, Thil pehbe be jongleh chun nasuhcham jou louhel ding ahi.
Kachapa, kaseiho hi nit jingin, Kathupeh chengse jong hi kikhol themin;
Kathupeh chengse nit jingin lang hin nan neiyin, Kahilna jouse jong namitchang bangin kichin jingin.
Abonchan khutjem bun kibun lang, Nalungchanga jong lekhajem kijih bangin kijih lut’in.
Chihna jah a chun, “Nangma kasopi numei nahi,” tin; Chujongleh asung gil’a “Nagol ngaitah kahi,” tin.
Chutileh numei chavaiya konin nahoidoh-intin, Pasalto jongji numei muhnal nua kona nahoidoh ding ahi.
Ajeh chu ka-inbang bangkot’a kona kavet’a, Bangvang kah a kona kavet leh,
Mi-lhamho lah a jong kamun, Gollhang ho lah-a jong kahedoh jie, Lungthim beiya um jing Gollhang khat aum jingin ahi.
Hiche gollhangpa chu Numei chavainu chenna veng ningkoiya chun ache len, Amanu inlam jotna lampia chun Hiche gollhangpa hi achei.
Jingkah phelvah-in jong Nilhah lamin jong jan muthim laiyinjong Avah len ache le jinge.
Hichun vetan, numei khat’in atoh khan. Aminu chu noti vonin akivonin ponlu akhuh-e.
Hiche numeinu hi apoh the thun, Jumle ja helouvin avah lei; Inmuna tou man louhel’in Akengto jaten ten’a um ahiye.
Kholaiya umna laiyam akitileh Kailhanga akimun, Veng ningkoi lai jousea Mi achanglhi le le jengin ahi.
Gollhangpa chu amu teng atuh chah jengin Achop chuh chuh jengin, Maichal ten tunin Gollhangpa jah a chun asei jin;
“Keiman kilhaina gan katha ding tampi aumin, Tuni nikhoa hi kakitepna jouse peh ding kati ahi;
Hijeh a chu nangma kouva hung potdoh kahin, Thanom tah a nangma hol ding kagot ahin tun kamutai.
Kajalkhun jong pon kapha jolsel’in, Egypt gama pon hoipen chu kisil din kakoiye;
Kajalkhun chu myrrh gimnamtui kathe khumsoh keiyin, Aleo namtui le thingthal namtuiyin kachap khumtai.
Hungin jingkah geiyin jah khovah hel’in Ichimset’in kidei hitin, Kilungset hitin Eini le eini kidei khovah hel hite.
Ajeh chu kajipa in’a aumpon, Khol gamla tah a kholjin in achetai.
Sakhao dimset’in sum akipoh-in, Lha lih lam teng inlama hung kile kit ding ahibouve,” ati.
Numeinu chun thu tampi aseiyin ajol jol jengin akhon khon nan athu nun tai; Kamnal hiu heova akihoupi leh Gollhangpa chu acham louhel’in anopsah tan ahi.
Alung ajaphut jengin amanu nung ajuitai, Akitha na ding mun jona che bongchal ham, Thanga oh-kha sakhigol bang ham khat’in Ami nu nung juiyin achen ahi.
Sakhigol thalpin alungchang athilpai bang leh Vacha pel’in avohgoi bangin achen, Ajotna lampi chun Ahinkho asuh bei ding lam akihetpoi.
Hijeh chun tun kathusei hi ngaiyuvin chapate, Kakamsung soh thu kiseiho hi phaten ngaiyun.
Nalungthim in hichenu lampi dung khu jui hih-in, Ami nu lamlhah dunga jong vahle hih hel’in.
Ajeh chu hichenu hin pasal tamtah asuhmang ahitan, Sepai hatlai lai jong athagam ahitai.
Hichenu inlampi hi noimigam jotna lam ahin, Thi na buikhuh sunga kilhung lut ahibouve.
Chih nan mi akoulou hiya, Thil hetkhen nan lhang asap lou ham?
Lhangvum sanglai lai le lampi pam dung, Lamlen lai laiya chihna chu adingle
Khopi kelkot phung dungle Kholen dom dom masang sanga, Chujongle kotjum dunga lutna jousea jong Kholhang asamle len,
“Vo mihemte, nang ho hi kakou nahiuvin, Mihem chapate chu kakou nahiuve.
Vo milham ho, lungchih kihil’uvin, Vo mi-ngolte lung lut’in ngaiyuvin.
Ngaiyuvin, keiman thil khoh tah tah kahil ding nahiuve; Keima kamsunga thudih jeng hung potdoh ding ahi.
Ajeh chu kakam hin thudih jeng aseidoh ding, Gitlouna thu sei ding hi kakam sunga potdia kathet ahi.
Kakama kasei jouse hi adih jeng ahin, Akikal’a kisei leh akon’a kisei aumpoi.
Ahekhen theipa dinga adih jeng ahin, Hetna neipa dinga thudih jeng ahi.
Dangka nakilah sanguvin kahilna kisanuvin, Sana lhentum sangin hetna joh kisan’uvin.
Ajeh chu sana pahcha jem sanga Chihna hi phachomjo ahin, Nadei jouse chu chihna kiti toh Tekah thei imacha aumpoi.
Chihna kiti keima hi lung limgeh a khosa kahin, Hetna le thil datkhenna kanei jinge.
Pakai gin kiti hi thilse thetbol ding ahin, Hijeh chun kiletsahna, nop chonna Thilse lam jenga kiheina. Akaleh leh a thusei kiti hi kahot ahi.
Keiman chihna phatah le guhthima Kihilna thei kaneiyin, Asung gil thu hetna leh Thahat kanei jinge.
Keijeh a lengten lengvai apohjiu ahin, Keijeh a vaipoten adih a thu atan theiyu ahiye.
Keijeh a milen milalten vai ahom’uva, Keijeh a milalten leiset apoh theiyu ahi.
Keima eingailute chu ka-ngailun, Lung gilten a eihol’an eimudoh teiye.
Haona jouse le jabol nan eijui jingin, Haona le phatthei nan eilha kangpoi.
Katohga hi sana sanga jong phachomjo, Sana thengsel sanga jong phajo ahi; Katohdohsa jong hi Dangka lhentum sanga phajo ahi.
Keiman lamdih jeng kahon, Thu adihlama kitanna tam jenga kachei.
Eingailute chu gou kasemdoh peh jin, Athil kholnau mun jouse kadipsoh tai.
Pakaiyin natoh apat’a pat einasemsa ahitan, Khanglui laiya pat atoh masah pen kahiye.
Amasa leiset hung kisempat masang, Kum asang sang masangpeh a keima tundohsa kahitai.
Keima kahung penlhah chun komtong ima jong aumpon, Twi putna twinah ho jong hi khatcha beh aumpoi.
Molsang jouse kigol toh masang, Thinglhang jouse kigol masanga Keima pengsa kahi.
Pathenin leiset le tollhang hijat asem masang, Vannoi leiset’a leivui um masanga umsa kahitai.
Pathenin vanmun jouse adodoh jong chun Keima anaumsa kahitan, Onghom maiya kolbem khat ajih doh jong chun Keima anaumsa kahitai.
Pathenin chunga vathamjol hijat atundet’a, Komdunga twinah hijat aphudoh masang,
Twikhanglen jong ageigol ding angahna asempeh a Twipi kinong jengin jong athupeh apalkeh louna ding abol’a Leiset bulpi khom jouse aphudoh a Agoldoh soh keipet jong chun
Keijong akoma kaumin khut themtah bangin kaume, Niseh le phatseh-in a-angsunga kakipah jingin ama din kipa thanopna kahijinge;
Pathenin mihem chenna dia asemsa leiset’a hin Kipah jingin kaumin mihem chate lah a kathanom jinge.
Hijeh chun tunjong kachapate kasei ngaiyuvin, Keima lamlhah a kijot jing ho chu anun nom ahiuve.
Hilchahna hi ngai phauvin lang ching theiyun, Hitobang hilchahna hi donlouvin koi hih hel’un.
Kasei sei ngaiya mihem chu anun nom ahi, Hitobang mi hin niseh leh Keima kelkot phung dunga angah jingin, Kakotpi phung dunga ading jinge.
Ijeh-inem itileh keima eiholdoh mihem chun hinna akimu ahitan, Ama chun Pakaiya konin lung lhaina akimu’ui.
Koi hijongleh keima donlouva chun Ama le ama kisuh khahna akimujin, Keima hot le mah a eibolte chun Thi ding bou adeiyu ahiye,”
Chihna hin ain ding akisah-in, Khompi jong sagi jen atungdoh tai.
Chihna hin kivahna ding gancha phabep jong akithan, Lengpitwi jong lhum keiyin akihal lhumin, Chihna hin anneh na dingin Ankong luina ding dokhang akidotai.
Munsang lai laiya um kholai dung jousea konin Mi kou dingin nu-ngah ho asoldoh-e;
“Koi koi hijongleh milhama um tapou chu Hikoma hin hung lut jeng hen!” atisah-e. Koi hijongleh Alungthim bei jouse chu, tin aseiye.
“Hunguvin keima anneh ding hung neuvin, Kadon ding lengpitwi hung don’uvin.
Milham mai maiya um ding chu nga-uvin, Asung gil jeng kholtoh-in kinkho manguvin,” ati.
Mi noisea bolte phoa adih bolsah ding gopachu Ama le ama akisuh neolo jin, Migilou adih a heidoh tei ding gopa jong Akisuh kha lo jin ahi.
Hijeh chun mi noise jong phoa dihsah din gotdan, Achutilouva ahileh nahotlo ding ahi; Miching chu phoh le chun Nangma na-ngailut lo ding ahi.
Miching chu hilchah din go le chun Nahil chana achihbe cheh cheh jeng ding ahi; Midih jong hil le chun Hetbe ding agot cheh cheh ding ahiye.
Pakai gin kiti hi chih kipatna bulpi ahin, Mithengpa hetna nei hi asung gil thu hetna ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh keijal’a nahin nikho kibe ding, Nahinkhoa nakum jat jong kibe ding ahiye.
Nangma nachih a ahileh Nachangseh dinga kichih nahin, Nangin mi nanoisea ahileh Aphat louna nachangseh a nakipoh ding ahi.
Numei ngol chu akam tamin a-eo lei loiyin, Hitobang numei hi pannabei, jachat helou ahibouve.
Hitobang numei hi ain kotpi phunga atouvin, Kholai dunga jong munsang lai laiya atoujie.
Ajotna ding khat jangpet’a kijot’a chele hochun Ahinjotpa tengu leh anakou koujie.
“Milham koi hijongleh Hikoma hung lut hen!” a tin; Koi hijeng jongleh Alungthim beiho jouse chu atin,
“Guh a kidon twi hi alhum in, Guhthima kine changlhah hi lung nachim aume,” ati.
Ahinla gollhangpa chun Hikoma hin thina aumbouve, ti ahepon; Hiche numeinu insunga jin lhung ho hi Noimigam thikhol khula lut ahitauve, ti ahepoi.
Solomon thuchih seiho. Chapa chingin mipa akipasah jin, Chapa ngol’in vang anu din hesohna asopeh-e.
Gitlou le engset’a kilamdoh gou chu apung theipon, Chondihna vang hin thina kona jong ahuhdoh ji ahi.
Pakaiyin midih chu gilkel’in adalha ngaipon, Migiloute vang chu aheodah jeng jie.
Khut jetsal nomlou thasen mi avaichat sah jin, Khut umthim theilou gen ngaitah-in mi ahaosah-e.
Kholum lai nipi laiya neh le chah kikhol khom chu Chapa lungthim chingtah ahin, Mi lho lhun laiya kinom ihmut chapa vang chu Gilkel thoh a kijumso tei tei ding ahi.
Midih luchanga phattheina gojuh-in ajun, Migiloute kamsunga vang pumhatna thusei jeng a pot’e.
Midihpa akigeldoh jingjeng hi phattheina ahin, Migiloute mim vang mom loi ding kisumil ding ahitai.
Milungthim chingin thu kiseipeh chan akisan ding, Thu mohsei sei jeng mi-ngol vang manthahna gei ding ahi.
Lungthim keh louva vah le chu lung mongding, Alamlhah jouse kisuh noh phah vung chu kimandoh tei ding ahiye.
Mit sat lhap lhap chun gimna asodoh jin, Hangtah a mi phoh a sudih theipa chun chamna asemdoh-e.
Midih kamsung hi hinna twinah tobang ahin, Migiloute kamsunga vang pumhat thujeng akisel’e.
Kihotna hin kidouna asosah jin, Ngailut nan vang thilse tampi akhujol jie.
Thil hetkhenna neipa a konin Akamsung soh thuseiya jong chihna akimudoh jin, Lungthim beipa vang chun Atungtuna mol-lhon adou dou jeng ding ahi.
Michingten hetna thil khol’in akhol jiuvin, Mi-ngol nop pao nan vang manthahna ahinlhut loi jie.
Mihaopa haona chu akiselna ding kulpi tobang ahin, Vaichate vaichatna vang hi amanthah nau ahi.
Midih chu atohgan hinna apuilut jin, Migilouten phatchomna anei vangu chu chonsetna apuilut’uva pang ahibouve.
Mi hilchahna kisana ngai jinga chun Hinna lampi ahokhan, Min aphosalna sang loupa vang chu Avah mangpai pai jin ahi.
Asunga hotna neijingpa chun jouthu aseiji ahin, Mi engkalna thusei seipa chu angol ahi.
Thu akitamsei behseh tengleh Seikhel suh khel a pang tei jin, Hijeh chun mi akam kihup thim thei chu Milung ching tah ahiye.
Midihpa leigui hi dangka thengsel manlu tobang ahin, Migiloute lungthim gil vang pannabei ahibouve.
Midihpa kamsungin mi tamtah vahva nathei Thu aseidoh doh jin, Mi-ngolte vang Lungthim beiyin athiji tauve.
Pakai phatthei boh vangin mi ahaodoh theiyin. Hichea hin aman gim gentheina apehbe poi.
Thildih lou bol kiti hi Mi-ngolte dia kichep golnop dan ahin, Thil hetkhenna neipa dinga vang Limgeh cha chon hi lung nachimna ahi.
Migilouvin mi ahoh kichatna chu Ama chungma ma a hung chu ding, Midih-in adei angai vang chu Itijongleh Pathenin apeh ding ahi.
Khopi hui anuna khogo ajuh teng Migilou chu atolmang thajin, Midih vang chu Tonsot geiya dinga kitungdoh ahitai.
Hatu dunga thei thuh kiket le Mit te nin meikhu adou lel bangin Mi thase jong chu Ahinsol ho din douthei ahipoi.
Pakai ginna hin mihem hinkho asotsahin, Hijeh chun migiloute hinkho vang akum u kisuchom ding ahi.
Midihte kinepna chu kipanan akichai jin, Migiloute kinepna vang mohseh ahijie.
Milungdih din Pakai hi kulpi dettah tobang ahin, Thilse bolte din vang manthahna ahibouve.
Midih chu amuna kona kideldoh jou louhel ding, Migiloute vanga gamsunga cheng theilou diu ahi.
Midih kamsunga chihna ahung potdoh jin, Akaleh akalouva thusei vang aleigui kitanpeh ding ahi.
Midih kamsungin santheidol thu asei theiyin, Migiloute kamsung vangin akaleh leh-in thu aseiye.
Thil agih kibang louva kilep’a kite chu Pakai dingin hot le thet umtah ahin, Agih kibanga thil akilep’a akitetoh vangleh Pakai dinga kipa thanopna ahi.
Kiletsahna ahung lut tengleh Vetdana ahung lut pai jin, Milung nengte dingin vang Chihna aum jing jenge.
Milungdih ho lungthim keh louhel’a aumu hi Amaho dinga amasangu lamsat’a pang ahin, Joule nal’a thusei ho lungthim put kon hin Akhonna leh amaho asuhmangji ahibouve.
Pathen lungsat nikhon Nei le gou jengin jong imacha aboljou pon, Dihna kiti vang hin Thina konin jong mi ahuhdoh jie.
Nolnabei midih chu alampi achejang jingin, Migilou vang chu agit lounan asot lhuhji ahi.
Midih ho dihnan amaho ahuhdoh jin, Jou le nal thuseiho vang alop nauvin soh a aneijiu ahi.
Migilou athi tengleh akinepna jong abeijin, Pathen hephaloute kinepna jong pannabei asohjie.
Midih chu genthei hesohna konin akihuhdoh jin, Migilou vang genthei hesohna alhalutjo jie.
Pathen hephalou mihem chun akamsungin Ainheng agalveng manna ding aseidoh jin, Amavang hetna thanei jeh-in Midihho huhdoh-in aum jiuve.
Midih ho aphattou tengu leh Khopi sung mite jong akipah jin, Migiloute amanthah vangleh Min a-oijiuvin kipah-in asam jiuve.
Midihho phatthei akiboh jeh-in Khopi sung mite jong choi-at aum jiuvin, Amavang migiloute kam tamjeh-in Khopin amanlo jin ahi.
Ainheng agalveng gelkhohna neiloupa chu Alungthim bei mong mong ahin, Thil ima hekhen them mihem vang chu Aum thim beh jin ahi.
Gamtina thu polea pang chun Thuguh geiyin aseidoh lo jin, Ahin alungthima tahsan theidol mihemin vang Thilguh kisel ho chu aimdoh jinge.
Kilamkaina abei tengleh Mipi akipal lhun, Guhthim thuhil athalhinna a vang Hoidohna aum jing jenge.
Kholjin mi dia thil lahman a kitung chun Itijongleh atohga akilo tei ding, Thil lahman a tun ding deiloupa vang iti itijongleh hoidoh tei ding ahi.
Mi lungset them numeiyin ja na akimun, Husana mi notho ho vangin noisena a-ang janga akipomu ahiye.
Mihem mi khoto them chun Ama dinga phatchomna akiboldoh ahin, Mi engse vang chun Ama kimavona akiboldoh ahibouve.
Migilouvin joule nal’in tohga akilah jin, Adih a natongpa vangin muchipha atu chu aga aki-atjie.
Adih kolchah a ngailua chun Hinna anei tei ding ahin, Koi hileh agilou lam lama kiheipa vang chu itijongleh thilo tei tei ding ahi.
Alung gil’a engsetna vop jing miho chu Pakai din thet umtah ahiuvin, Akiheina lam lama nolna beiho vang chu Pakai din akipana ahijing jengui.
Kichentah-in heuvin Mihem a-engsea chu talen man louva umlou ding, Midihho vang chu Huhdoh a umtei tei diu ahi.
Kho pholou numei donghoi chu Vohpi nahhoma sana chaokol kibapeh tobang ahi.
Midihho deichat thil chu Thilpha jengin bou akichaijin, Migiloute kinepna vang chu Lungsat nan akichaisoh keijie.
Ilouhel’a thilphal mihem chu Ahao cheh cheh jeng jin, Mihem khatman apeh ding dol jong akinung lah vangin Alhasam cheh cheh jengin aning lhingdeh poi.
Mihong phaltah chu haocheh cheh ding, Mi dinga twi chap peh peh chu ama jong twi kichap peh ding ahiye.
Chang homdoh louva itchahpa chu Mipin agaosap sap jin, Hongphal tah a chang joh a pangpa chun Alujang dimset’in phattheina akikhuh jie.
Lung giltena thilpha holpan Lung lhaina aholdohjin, Thilse jeng jong chu Thilse holpa chunga ahung chui.
Aneile agou ahaona a kisongpa chu itijongleh agumgoa hung kitung ding, Midihho vang chu Thingna nou banga engsel diu ahi.
Koi hileh ainsung vaipo themlou chun To tunna man neilouva huiya leng bang ding, Chujongleh mi-ngolpa chu Michingho lhacha pang ding ahi.
Midih tohga chu Hinna thingphung ga tobang ahin, Kimoh chihsah hin Hinkho jouse asuh manglo jin ahin.
Leiset chunga midih bon akile thuh a ahileh Migilou chu ichan geiya kibol ding hiya michonse inchan geiya kibol ding hitam!
Koi koi hijongleh kigahna deiya chun Hetna jeng jong adeiyin, Min apho ding ngainom loupa vang chu Mi-ngol michavai ahibouve.
Miphan Pakai lungdei aboldoh jin, Thil phalou lou ngaitopa vang Pakaiyin themmo apei.
Gitlouna a konin mihem ainchengdoh pon, Midihho vang chu koiman atou akalkang louhel ding ahi.
Numei jinu pha chu Ajipa dinga lallukhuh ahijengin, Jum le jamo boldoh nu vang chu Ajipa dia agu achang monsa tobang ahi.
Midihho lunggel thil ngaito jouse chu Adih lama thu tanpeh dingbou ahin, Migilouten thuguh angaitou chu joulhepna jeng jeng ahibouve.
Migilouten thu asei jousen Thisan sona ding jeng aseiyun, Midihho kamsung soh vang chu Mihem huhdohna ding jeng ahi.
Migiloute chu akileh khup jin Chutengleh abeipai jin ahi; Midihho vang chu Ainchen det jing jeng ding ahi.
Mihem chu alungthim phat dungjuiyin Min aseipha jin, Alung gil’a gitlouna gelpa vang chu Hot le mah-in aumdoh jie.
Milen milal tah a chon’a Anneh lhasama kel thoh sangin, Milham mai maiya uma Lung nengtah a ama ding na kitohpa chu aphajoi.
Midih chun agancha hinkho ding agel khohpeh jin, Migilouten mi kahepi atiu vang chu engsetna ahibouve.
Agam leiset kikhot hat’a Lou bola thalhingpa chun anneh neng jeng junga anei ding, Pannabei thil jeng suhdel toudelpan Lungthim bei ahijeh a ima aneilou ding ahi.
Migilou kulpi insang chu Manthahna ahung geiloi jin, Midihho vang chu thingphung pha bangin Ajung akhodet chet’in akikang poi.
Migilou chu aseikhel akamsungsoh Athusei ma man akipal lhu jin, Midih vang chu Gentheina a jong atoldoh theiye.
Mihem chun aseithem ga akineh a Lung nachima umji ahin, Hijeh chun mihem khat natoh chu Ama chungma ma a hung lechuh kitji ahi.
Mi-ngol mitvet’in Ama chena chu lamdih danin amun, Midih vang chun Min ahilna angaiyin lamse apeldoh jie.
Mi-ngol chun adeilou chu aseidoh pai jengin, Milungdih vangin min a-engkalna jong ilouvin agel’e.
Thudih seipa hin Phot chetna kicheh tah avetsah jin, Jouthua hettohsah a pangpa vang chun jou le nal achop khoma aseiji ahibouve.
Thu kisei abang bang hin Douthei louhel’in chemjama kisun bangin mi asunin, Michingte thuseiyin vang Mihem adamsah thei hel jenge.
Thutah seiho kamsunga aitih-in jong thutah a pot jin, Thujou seiya pang miho kamsunga thusoh vang chomkah a dingbou ahi.
Thilse ngaitoa pang ho lungthima joulhepna ding jeng achengin, Thilpha ngaito dingin vang Kipana anei jing jengui.
Midih chunga natna ahung lhungji pon, Migiloute vang chu genthei hesoh adimset jiuve.
Jou le nal thu jeng seiya pang kamsung chu Pakai dingin thet umtah ahin, Kitah le gunchu tah a natong ho vang chu Pakai dinga kipa thanopna ahiuve.
Milung chingin ahetna chu akisel themjin, Mi-ngol hon vang angolnau aphongle leuve.
Lung giltah neihon akhut’a vai ahom diu, Khut lap nomlou mi thase chu engbolna sohna kitohsah ding ahi.
Alungthima lung gimna nei mihem chu Atahsan agep lo jin, Khotona thupha akiseipeh a ahileh Hitobang mi chu akipah thanom jie.
Lang neina neilou mi chu Amajeng jong ama dia golpha tah hithei ahin, Migiloute vang chu Alampiuvin abonchan apui mangji tauve.
Mi thasen aneh ding jong akimujou lou ding, Milung chingin vang nei le gou aset neng ding ahi.
Lamdih lama chun hinna akimun, Lamdih louvin thina mi apuilut jie.
Chapa chingtah-in Apan ahilna angaiyin, Mi daichavaiya pangpan vang Min aphona jeng jong angaipoi.
Miphan kam cholman thilpha akineh jin, Jou le nal jeng seipan vang pumhat’a bol dingbou adeiye.
Mi akam kituppa chu akihinso jin, Koi hileh akamche jousen manthah nan aneilo jie.
Mi thasen alungthim in an ahol hol jin Ahivanginla imacha akimupoi; Ahivangin milung ching chun Lung nachim in adeichan akimui.
Midih chun jousei kiti hi adeipon, Migilou vang chu jachat chatna lc hepina beiyin achonjie.
Milungdih chu adih-in bou ahoidoh jin, Migilou vang chu chonset nan aleh khupji tai.
Mihem khat akihao sah lheh-in, Ahivanginla imacha aneipoi; Mihem khatma chu akivaichat sah lheh jeng kit’in, Ahin hichepa hin nei le gou tamtah aneiye.
Mihem chun anei le agouva Ahinkho aki lhatdoh ji ahin, Hijeh chun mivaicha pan vang Kilhatdohna ding imacha aneipoi.
Midihho thaomei avahjing jengin, Migiloute thaomei vang hung mit loi ding ahitai.
Nahsah loujeh-in thu ngai loute akitoh mon, Min ahilna kisanho din vang chihna akimu’uve.
Hetman louva kimu nei le gou chu Chomkah louvin bei loiyin tin, Nei le gou athem thema kihol khompa nei vang Pung cheh cheh jeng ding ahi.
Kinepna aketeng leh Mihem lungthim adammo sah jin, Hijeh chun lungdei akimolsoa ahileh Hinthing phung banga bing jing thei ahi.
Thu kisei nahsah louva koipa chu Achunga manthahna hung lhung ding, Koi hijongleh thupeh khohsah a chun Kipaman asantei tei ding ahi.
Michingin mi ahilna chu Hinna twinah tobang ahin, Ama mihilna a kona hi Midangin thina apeldoh thei ahi.
Lungthim phan lungdei aboldoh jin, Kitahna bei miho vang manthah na avah lut jiuve.
Imajouse ijakaiya milung chingin Hetoh demsan na atongjin, Mi-ngol’in vang angolna chu Pheh jangin aphoujah jin ahi.
Sottolle miphalou vin Miho lung gim hesoh-in aumsah jin, Mi ki-nganse tahsan umtah vang chun Lungdamna thei jeng alhut jie.
Mi sei ngai loupa chunga chun Vaichatna le vetdana ahung lhungjin, Min aphohna ngai khenpa vang chu Mihem jabolna achang jie.
Deichat khat kimolso hi Hinkhoa dinga lung nachim um lheh jeng ahin, Ahivangin-thilsea kona kihei mang ding hi Mi-ngol ho dingin thet umtah thil bangin agel’ui.
Michingto kivoppa chu achingin, Mi-ngol ho to kivoppa vang chun toset atokhah ding ahi.
Chonsete chu hamset nan ajuile len, Midihho vang chu nei le gouvin ajui jing uve.
Miphan atute khanga dingin Nei le gou adalhah peh jin, Michonsen nei le gou akhol vang chu Midih chan dinga akholpeh ahibouve.
Mivaichan lou abol’a ahileh Alhosoh aphan aphung theiyin, Ahivanginla alhosoh abonchan Thu adih louva thutan hon abahgam peh ji tauve.
Achapa mol’a jep loupan Mol boh dingjoh a-it ahin, Hijeh chun achapa ngailua chun Lungthim themtah-in agah chah jie.
Midih chun aduchat aneh khop anei jingin, Migilouho vang gilkel’a oi lhep theh a umji ahiuve.
Numei chingin ainchen akisemphat’in, Numei ngol’in vang inchen asuhkeh joh ahi.
Koi hileh lungdih a lamjot’in Pakai aging khen jin, Amavang alamlhah jousea thilse gel pan Pakai chu deimo le hot’in aneijie.
Mi-ngol’in atungtuna mol chuhna ding akiseidoh jin, Miching hon vang ahoidohna theiyu akiseidoh jiuve.
Loukai ding bongchal um louna Chang akilamdoh pon, Hijeh chun bongchal thahat vanga Chang neng tah a kilamji ahiye.
Mi kitah hettohsah a pang chun Thujou asei ngaipon, Mijou hettohsah a pangpa vangin Thu asei chan a jouthu jeng akhedoh doh jeng ahi.
Akaleh akalouva totpan Chihna ahol jong chu panna bei ahin, Ahin thil ijakai datkhen thempa dinga Thil hetna nei ding hi hahsa louhel ahi.
Mi-ngol kom dalhan lang che mangin, Ama koma hin hetna thu kisei khatcha namudoh poi.
Milung ching chihnan Ajotna ding lampi ahetsah jingin, Mi-ngol ho ngolnan vang Joulhepna jeng aseidoh-e.
Pathenin migilou ahouse jin, Milungdih ho vangin Pathen lungdei akimu’uve.
Mihem lungthim hin Hinkho hesoh genthei ahen, Akipana jong chu Kho pholou min akipapi theipoi.
Migiloute inchen kisumang ding, Milungdih ho ponbuh vang longlouva kisong jing ding ahi.
Mihem khat din Lampi khat chu lamdih bangin akimun, Ahivangin hiche lampi chu Atopna thina ahijie.
Nuijat pet jeng jongleh Mihem lungthim hi ahesoh-in, Chujongleh kipana jonghi Gim nan akichaiji bouve.
Milungdih lou chu Achena lam lama atohmo vaset’a aneh ding, Chule mipha jong chun Atohga akinehva ding ahi.
Milham chun ajah a kisei thu tapou atahsan in, Milung chingin vang achena ding phaten akivet dim deme.
Miching kicha geovin aum jin, Thilsea konin akiheidoh jin ahi; Mi-ngol vang chu apoh the thun, Chavai deh duh-in aum jie.
Mihem alungchom chun Ngol hoitah-in na atong jin, Thil datkhen je them mihem in vang Thoh hat tah-in angah jie.
Milham chun ngolna akimu jin, Miching hon vang hetna hi lallukhuh banga akhuh jiu ahi.
Thilse jouse thilpha angsunga aboh khupjin, Migilouho jong Midih kelkot phung dunga aboh khup’uve.
Mivaicha hi ainheng agalveng dia jong Homthona um louhel ahitan, Mihaovin vang Golle pai tampi aneiye.
Ainheng agalveng khohsah lou chu Michonse ahin, Mivaichate khoto pachu Mi nun nom ahiye.
Thilse ngaito jing ho khun Toh khel anei ngai mongu hilou ham? Thilpha ngaito jing ho vangin Tahsanna le kitahna akimu’uve.
Toh hahsa kitipou pouvin Phatchomna asosah teiyin, Tohna beiya thu homkeo sei kiti hin Vaichatna asosah jie.
Miching ho chihna hi Alallukhuh uva pang ahin, Mi-ngol hon vang ngolna hi Pahchavui ki-o banga aki-ou ahitai.
Thudih seiya hettohsah a pangpan Mihem hinkho tampi ahuhhing jin, Amavang koi hijongleh thujou seiyan Mihem amoh lhep chavat’a asuhmang ahi.
Pakai ginna kon hin Mihemin kisonna anei theiyin, Achate jeng jong chu Ama lima kisel diu ahi.
Pakai gin kiti hi Hinna twinah tobang ahin, Hichea kona hi Min thina jong apeldoh thei ding ahi.
Mipi let the thua akitit hi Lengpa dinga loupina ahin, Mihem lhomcha ahivangleh Milen milal dia jong manthahna bep ahibouve.
Mihem alung hangvah chun Thil hetkhen themna giltah aneiyin, Lung kinthe thua milung chomin vang Ngolna akiboldoh teiye.
Lungthim ol heocha um hi Tahsa damtheina ahin, Amavang thil khat deicha jinga um hi Gu le chang gepna ahibouve.
Mivaicha bolset kiti hi Asempa Pathen engkalna ahin, Hijeh chun koi hijongleh nelou chalou khoto chun Asempa Pathen a jabol joh ahiye.
Migilou chu thilse abolsan Akhup athel’a aleji ahin, Midih vang chun alungthim keh louva aumjeh-in Kiselna ding akimu jing nai.
Thil hekhen them mihem lunggil’a Chihna acheng jingin, Mi-ngol ho lung sung vanga Chihna hin chenmun akimupoi.
Adih hin mihem nam khat achoi sangin, Chonset nan mihem nam pumpi vetdan aumsah-e.
Lhacha a pang ching themtah a natong chun Lengpa lungdei aboldoh jin, Chule jachat chatna natongpa chunga Lengpa alungsan ahi.
O nem heova mi akidonbut leh Lungsat jeng jong alungdam theiyin, Amavang opoh leng lunga thusei hin Mi aphin lung hang theiye.
Miching ho leigui hi thuseiya akile chanin Hetna thujeng aseidoh doh jengin, Amavang mi-ngol ho kamsunga konin Ngolna thu jeng ahung lengdoh jeng junge.
Pakaiyin muntin hi amit te nin amusoh keiyin, Thilse le thilpha kibol jong amelchih jinge.
O nem heova thuseiya pang leigui hi Hinna thingphung tobang ahin, Thu gilou jeng seiya pang leigui hi Lungthim jouse susea pang ahi.
Apan ahilna ngailou chu Mi-ngol mong mong ahin, Apan asuh khel adih lama ahilna ngaipa vang Milungthim chingtah asoh-e.
Midih insunga Nei le gou tampi akikhol’in, Migilouvin akilodoh jat jong chu Lunggim hesohna bep ahijie.
Miching ho kamsunga konin Hetna thu akithejal jal jin, Mi-ngol ho lunggil sunga vang Hitobang hi ahinai saipoi.
Migilouho kilhaina gantha jouse chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, Midihho taona vang chu Pakai dinga kipa thanopna ahiye.
Migilou kiheina lam chu Pakai dinga thet um ahin, Adih lam delle pa vang chu Pakaiyin angailui.
Lamdih dalha pa dingin Kigahna hahsa tah akibolpeh-in, Chujongleh akiphona deiloupa chu itijongleh thitei tei ding ahi.
Pakai masanga Noimigam le thikhol khuljong honsa ahicheh-in, Chuti ahileh Mihem lungthim chu iti hetmo hi ding ham!
Akaleh akalouva chonpan Min aphodih ding adeipon, Ama chu Miching ho koma jong chelou ding ahi.
Lungthim kipah chun Maiso jong alhan lhaisah jin, Lungthim agima ahesoh vangleh Lhagao jengjong akinoigep pai ahitai.
Hetkhenna neipa lungthim gil’in Hetna aholbe be jin, Mi-ngol ho kamsung in vang Ngolna thujeng asei seijin ahi.
Bol genthei hesoh thohte hinkho hi Alhum kei geiya thilse jeng dimset ahin, Lungthim kipah jinga umthei vang chu Golvah bol bol jeng tobang ahi.
Nei le gou tamtah neiya Hesoh genthei thohpi sangin, Themcha bou neiya Pakai ging khencha um ding aphajoi.
Bongchal thaotah kitha a Kihotna le kimahna nei sangin, Anchetam jeng hijongleh kihona Ngailutna neiya neh ding anomjoi.
Milung phingin kinahna tampi asosah jin, Milung neng lung hangvah louvin kidouna jong asuthip’e.
Mi thase chu akiheina lam lam Lingle khao adimset jin, Midihho lamlhah vang Lamlen lhong nal kitoh tah a kilhung ahijie.
Chapa chingin mipa akipahsah jin, Mihem angoljon vang anu jeng jong isah louvin aboljie.
Lungthim beipa din Ngolna jeng jong kipana ahin, Thil hetkhen je thempa vang chu Jangkeiyin amachal jinge.
Kihou lhihna beiyin thilgon ho hi achekhel jin, Guh a mihil thei atamna a mi alolhing teiye.
Kitoh chet’a kidonbut hi Mihem dinga kipana ahin, Hijeh chun aphat cha kisei thu hi iti phat’a pha hi tan tem!
Michingpa lamlhah chu hinna lama akilhung touvin, Hijeh chun aman noilama noimigam apeldoh theiye.
Mi kiletsah hochu Pakaiyin ain aphet lhah peh jin, Meithai gamsung vang chu Pakaiyin agamgi asuh phet peh poi.
Migilou lung gel jouse hi Pakai dinga thet umtah tah ahin, Milung thengte thuseiho vang chu Pakai dia lung lhaina jeng ahi.
Mi koi hileh lamdih louva phatchomna holchun Ainsung dingin lung gimna aboldoh jin, Hijeh chun koi hileh nehguh deilou chu Itijongleh kihinso tei ding ahi.
Midih-in mi thusei iti donbut ding ham Tin phate chan angai jin, alung gil’in agel’in; Ahinla Migilouten vang Akamsung uva konin thilse jeng aseiyun twi kisunglha abahsah jenguve.
Migiloutea konin Pakai chu Gamla tah-in akidalse jingin, Midih ho taona vang chu Phaten angaipeh jin ahi.
Min mit-ha hoisel’a mi avet leh Min jong lungthim kipa nan aneiyin, Chujongleh thupha kisei hin jong Mihem gu le chang jouse akidosah jie.
Min adih lama aphona lung lut’a ngaipa chu iti jongleh miching ho lah a lha thei ding ahi.
Koi hileh min ahilna ija sah loupa chun Ahinkho akisuh genthei ahibouve; Hijeh chun min ahil chahna jouse ngaiya chun Thil hetkhenna anei tei ding ahiye.
Pakai gin kiti hi Chihna dia kihilna hi ahin, Chule kineosah masah a Chutengleh jabolna hungsoh ji ahibouve.
Mihem lung gil hin Thilgon aneiji ahin, Ahin lei kilehpel’a thu kisei jong Pakaiyin adonbut jie.
Mihem khat’in akiheina lam lam chu Amit te nia avetdol’in adih atheng jengin amun, Ahivangin Pakaiyin Alungthima atohdol achedol chu atetohji ahibouve.
Nabol natoh chan chu Pakaiya pedoh jengin, Chutileh nathilgon aboncha lolhing ding ahi.
Thil ijakai hi Pakaiyin Akimanchah nading dol cheh a asem ahin, Hijeh a chu migilou jeng jong Genthei hesoh nikhoa dia umah ahi.
Mihem akiletsah tapou chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, Hijeh chun kichenin heuvin Hitobang mi chu talen man louva kikoi louhel ding ahi.
Tahsan theidola chon leh kitahna hin Thepmona jeng jong aheitoh theiyin, Chule Pakai ginjeh-in Mihemin thilse apeldoh theiye.
Mihem chu akiheina lam lama Pakai alung lhai tengleh Pakaiyin hitobang mihem chu Amelmate jeng tojong akichamsah theiye.
Adih lou pum puma kai tampi kidon khom sangin Adih lama thil themcha nei ding aphajoi.
Mihemin alung gil sunga achena ding lampi agonin, Ahivangin Pakaiyin akalsena ding akopeh jie.
Lengpa kamsunga konin Pathen thusei ahung ging jin, Hijeh chun lengpan thu atan tengleh atankhel theipoi.
Thil gih te-na le thilsao te-na hi Aboncha Pakaiya ahin, Hijeh chun dip sunga kitedoh thil ho hi Aboncha Pakaiyin atedohsa ahibouve.
Leng ho dinga thilse bol ding hi Thet le hot umtah tah ahin, Ajeh chu lal touna hi Adih a kitungdoh ahi.
Kamsunga thudih akiseiya ahileh Lengpa din kipa thanopna ahin, Hijeh chun lengpan jong Thudih seiya pang chubou angailui.
Lengpa lungsatna hi Thina ding thangkouva hung ahijin, Ahivanginla michingin Lengpa lungsat hi alung damsah theiye.
Lengpa chu amai lhan lhaisel’a ahileh Hinjou jou aum jin, Chujongleh lengpa lung lhaina hi Gohong hinphi lha thei meilhang tampi tobang ahi.
Sana sangin chihna kimu ding aphajon, Dangka sanga jong thil hetkhenna thei kilhen joh ding ahi.
Midih chu lamse lama konin akiheidoh jin, Achena lampia kiging thempa chu akihinso teiye.
Manthah ding kon leh Kiletsahna ahung um masajin, Kipal lhuh ding konleh Lhagao hoithona ahung um masa jie.
Mi kiletsahte toh Gal-thil kichomdoh kihom sangin, Lungthima kineosah a Mivaichate toh lhat khom ding aphajoi.
Koi hileh thu kisei phatea ngaiya chu itijong leh khangtou tei ding, Chujongleh koi hileh Pakaiya kisong chu Mi nun nom hiyah ahiye.
Lungthim chingpa chu Thil hekhen thei mihem akitin, Chule lung lhai lhaina theiya thusei thei chun Mi aha thu nun cheh theiyin ahi.
Chihna hi aneitheipa dingin Hinna twinah tobang ahijengin, Mi-ngol ho ngolna vang hi Amaho dinga talen matna ahibep’e.
Miching lung gil’a kon athusei chun Athusei jouse danto kitoh-in aseisah jin, Aseidoh jouse chun Mi athu nun jep kit nalaiye.
Lung lhai lhaina theiya thu kisei ngei hi Khoiju phang tobang ahin, Lhagao dingin alhum jen jenin Tahsa dingin jong damtheina mong mong ahi.
Mihem khat din Lampi khat chu lamdih bangin akimun, Ahivangin hiche lampi chu Atopna thina ahijie.
Natongpa hi aduchat chun achamlouva atohsah ahin, Hijeh a chu aduchatna alol chun ano no jeng ahitai.
Pannabei mihemin thilse jeng angaiton, Thu asei jongleh meikah bangin apeh lah lah jie.
Akaleh akalouva chonpan Kinahna kibaona athethang soh jin, Guhthim thupolea pang chun Golngai le golngai jong asukhen jie.
Pumhat jenga natong min Aheng akom jeng jong atilsen, Chutengleh aheng akompa jong chu Lamse lam a apuilut jin ahi.
Mihem amit teni phedot dot chun Thil akaleh lam jenga agon ahin, Anephu teni kikhip kheh a lha pa jong chun Thil dihlou abolsa ahitai.
Tehse lukang kheh ahin kiti hi Loupina lallukhuh khat ahin, Hinkho dih tah a akimanchah le bou Hitobanga hi kihingsot ahi.
Mi thahat sangin Lung nenga lung hangvah lou aphachom jon, Alungthim athu thua nunsah joupa chu Khopi khat gal’a jouva kilahpa sangin aphajoi.
Khutphang komtong sunga vang akisan jin, Aphun phatle phatlou chu Pakaiya hung konbou ahi.
Insunga kinah pum puma golvah akibol sangin Angum seh seh kineh a lung monga um aphajoi.
Misoh ching theitah a natong chun Apupa chapa ahilou louva chonpa chunga jong vai ahom ahi. Chujongleh hitobang sohpa chun Apu gou jong achapate chutoh asopiu banga akihoppi ding ahiye.
Thil solna leibel chu Dangka solna ding ahin, Thuh khuh sung chu sana solna ding ahi; Pakai vang hi lungthim jouse patepna ahi.
Thilse bolnom pan akamsunga Gitlouna thujeng seipa thusei angaiyin, Chule mijouvin jong jou le nal seina lei kilehpel chu angaijoi.
Mivaicha totna neipa chun Asempa Pathen a-engkal ahin, Mi hamsetna chunga kipahji chu Talen man louva umlou hel ding ahi.
Tehse dinga atute hi alallukhah tobang ahin, Chule mi chapate loupina jong apateu ahi.
Thu ngeitah a kisei chu Mi-ngol dingin imacha ahipon, Milen milal koma thujou kisei jong Hiche sang hin phatchom na bei cheh ahikit’e.
Nehguh kipe hi apepa mit mun Mitpheldoi song tobang ahin, Hijeh chun akiheina lam lama Machalna aneiyin ahi.
Koi hileh bolsetna ngaidam jou chun Ngailutna ahol nah lai ahin, Amavang avel vel’a mi phul kitpan Gol le pai jong akikhenpi jin ahi.
Mi-ngol chu khuttuma ja khat vei akichup-sangin, Thil hetkhenna neipa din kipho mai mai jong asunglut joi.
Mi engsen doumah mah bol ding jeng ahol’in, Hijeh chun amato kidou din sottol engse akisolpeh jie.
Mihemin mi-ngol chu angolpet’a akimupi sangin Savom nou kilodohpeh nunga api kimupi ding abaijoi.
Mihemin thilpha chu thilsea alethuh a ahileh, Ainsunga kona thilse chu potdoh lou ding ahi.
Kitomo hung kipatna chu Twi hung putdoh to bang ahin, Hijeh chun kinahna aso masangin Kikhendoh loi leu chun aphai.
Migilou them chansah pale Midih themmo chansah pa chu Koijoh ahilhona ani ni lhona chu Pakai dinga thet umtah gel ahilhone.
Lungthimbon neilou mi-ngol chun ipi khoh a chihna kichohna dinga sum akichoi ding ham?
Kigol ngaipin aitih geiyin mi alungset nan, Sopi mong mong vang hi kidoupi dia peng ahibouve.
Lungthim bei mihem chu Thil lahman pen apang jin, Hiti hin aheng akom mitmun Thil lahman in akitungjie.
Thil suh khel ding dei jing mi chun Kinah a kitomo ding adei ahin, Ain kotpi kiletsah a sangtah a kikampan Manthahna ding angaito ahibouve.
Mihem alungthim janglou chu Akhangtou theipon, Jou le nal seiya pang leigui kilehpel jong Hamsetna achukha teijin ahi.
Chapa ngol chu apa dia lung gimna ahin, Hijeh chun mi-ngolpa hingpa chu akipah poi.
Lungthim sung kipah thanoma um kiti hi Damdoi phatah damna ahin, Lung lhadah a akium vang leh Gu le chang jouse geplo sah ahiye.
Thu adih lama tanna thei lam jouse leheipehna din Migilouvin pon noiya guhthim in nehguh akilah-e.
Thil ijakai hekhen thei mihem in Chihna lam jenga amai angat’in amadel’e; Amavang mi-ngol’in amit te nin Leiset mong kol kim vel ave le lei.
Chapa ngol chu apa dinga lung gimna ahin, Ahingnu dinga jong gentheina tah ahiye.
Midih leosah ding hi thildih apha ahipon, Milen milal jep ding jong adihlou ahi.
Thusei ngaikhama chun hetna anei ahin, Chule lung nengtah a thusei thei chu thil hekhen them ahi.
Mi-ngol hijongleh thip beh cha umthei chu Miching danin akigel’in, Ama chun akam akihup thima ahitengleh Lung chingtah danin akingaitoi.
Mihem ama nop nop’a chonpan Ama thu nun na lam lamin akisan, Itobang hijongleh thumop ding akiti teng Mohseh-in alung hang jeng jin ahi.
Mi-ngol chun imacha hetbena dinga Lung lhaina le thanopna aneipon, Ama lung gel ngaito jeng bou Phondoh doh jeng ding adeiye.
Gitlouna ahung umdoh tengleh Thangsetna jong ahung umdoh paiyin, Jabolna ahung um lou jongleh Kivetdana ahung umdoh jin ahi.
Mihem kamsunga hung kon thu kiseiho hi Twi thuh lah tobang ahijengin, Chihna bulpi jong hi Vadung hom teh leuva hunglong twi tobang ahi.
Migilou masanga lang nei ding aphapon, Midih koma thu adih a kitan suh chatvai ding jong aphapoi.
Mi-ngol kamsunga kinahna akon jin, Akamsungin mol’a kijepna akiseidoh jie.
Mi-ngol kamsung hi ama dinga manthahna ahin, Ane chung le noiyin akipalsah a athang apel’a pang ahilhone.
Guhthima thu polea pangpa thusei hi Antui tah kine abang jin, Athupoh jeng jong chu Mi laigil sunga alut jel jel jenge.
Anatohna thase mihem chu Mi sumanga pangpa toh sopicha ahilhone.
Pakai min vang hi gal pal vuma insang kisa tobang ahin, Hijeh chun midih chu alima alhailut jin akisel jie.
Mihaopa haona agou chu Ama dingin khopi dettah tobang ahin, Ama huhdohna dinga Pal kikai tobang bang ahiye.
Mihem amanthah ding kon leh Alungthima kiletsahna ahung pengin, Kineosahna nei masa chun Jabolna akimudoh teiye.
Thu jatoh lou laiya moh donbut jeng chu Ama dinga angolna le ajumna akil boldoh ahi.
Mihem lhagaovin natna vang athoh jouvin, Amavang lhagao akinoigoi teng iti athoh jou ding ham?
Mi alungthim giltah aching chun Hetna akimube ben, Chujongleh miching ho hin Hetna holnan anabeng ado le leuve.
Mihem khat chu athilpeh-in mun asempeh jin, Hijeh chun milen milal angsunga jong alutsah theiye.
Koi hileh achung chang thu kisei masah chu Adih lheh lheh bangin akimun, Akihehpi pa ahung lut’a akikhol chil tengleh Athudol chu akiseipan thei bep nalaiye.
Phun san kiti hin kinahna jouse asubeiyin, Thanei tah tah teni kah a jong thutanin apangjie.
Sopi khat asopin akithopi hi Khopi dettah tobang ahijengin, I-kinah a ahivangleh Khopi kelkotgol kigol khum abang jenge.
Mihemin kamhat’in oiva akimun, Min akamsung soh mong mong akineh teng alungna achime.
Thi le hin hi lei lethem le them louvin apon, Koi hijongleh adih louva thuseiya lei leh an aga akilo tei ding ahi.
Pasal’in numei ji akimu tengleh Nun noma ahitan, Hijeh chun Pakaiya konin jong Lung lhaina akimui.
Mivaichan thu asei chanin atao thon, Mihaovin vang thu asei teng akiletsah bel bul’e.
Gol le pai phatah banga kisem Mi sumang thei gol le pai tampi aumin, Amavang gol le pai abang bang hi Penpi mong sopi sanga jong kinaipijo aum’e.
Mi-ngol thu akaleh akalouva seipa sangin Hinkho phatea kiman thei mivaicha aphajoi.
Mihem din hetna beiya um ding jong aphapon, Kinle bonga kal sonpan jong alampi akimansah jie.
Mi-ngol chu ngol nan asuhmang teng, Alungthim in Pakai a-oimo kit nalaiye.
Nei le gou hin gol le pai thah thah asemben, Mivaichapa vang agolpan jong adalha jitai.
Jou le nal seiya hettohsah a pang chu Itijongleh talen man louva um lou ding, Thujou seiya pang jong chu Toldoh louhel ding ahi.
Mihong phal chun ama lung lhaina ding hol Mihem tampi aneiyin, Chule thil hompa dingin Mihem jouse agol le apai ahiye.
Mivaichapa chu asopiten jong Abonchauvin ahotbol soh keitauve; Agol le apai mai mai hon Iohan geiya gamla adalhah diu hi tam? Aman thu asei sei jengin Anungu adel vangin apha tapoi.
Mihem chihna kimupan ahinkho angailut ahin, Thil hekhen jing theipa khangtou ding ahi.
Jou le nal seiya hettohsah a pang chu Itijongleh talen man louva um lou ding, Chule thujou sei tapou chun Athilo tei tei ding ahi.
Mi-ngol dinga kinopsah a hinkho manchah hi kitoh lou ahin, Soh a pangpa dia milen milalte chunga vaihom ding jong kitohmo cheh kit ahi.
Lungthim phat hin mi alunghan sah vah ji pon, Min abolsetna akimumo sah jong hi aloupina ahi.
Lengpa lungsat hi sakei bahkai ngih del dul tobang ahin, Alung lhaina jong hamhing lah a daitwi va-lha abange.
Chapa ngol hi apa dinga manthahna ahin, Numeiyin ajipa akinahpi pi hi gotwi vachet chut tobang ahi.
In le nei le gou hi pule pa a kona kiloson ahin, Numei chingtah ji kinei vang hi Pakai peh ahi.
Thaset kiti hin mi alhim ihmun, Hijeh a chu mi thase chu kel thoh ding ahi.
Thupeh nit’a chun ahinkho jeng jong akihonbit ahin, Thu kisei nahsah lou vang chun thina akimu ding ahi.
Mivaicha khoton Pakai joh akhoto ahin, Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin atohman alepeh ding ahi.
Semphat thei ahiya kinep aumpet’in Nachapa kigahsal’in, Moh suhmang jeng din Nalungthim in gel dan.
Mi lungtong bet but’in hamsetna atokhah tei ding ahi, Don louvin koi jengin nangin jong nahamset lo ding ahi.
Min nathumopna ngaiphan lang Nahilchahna chu kisan themin, Chutileh nangman khonunga dia Chihna nanei thei ding ahi.
Mihemin alung gil’a Thilgon tampi aneiyin, Ahinla akiphutdet pen ding chu Pakai lungdei angaito chubou ahi.
Mihema kona kidei chu kitahna anei ding hi ahin, Hijeh chun mijou sangin maivaicha aphajoi.
Pakai ginna hin mi ahinson, Hijeh chun Pakai gingpa chu alungna chime; Hitobang mihem chu Hamset nan aphah lou ding ahitai.
Mi thasen bukong sung asoh jin, Akhut chu athaset jeh-in akamsung geiyin jong anung dop lut joupoi.
Mi akaleh akalouva tot chavaipa chu jep’in, Chutileh milham in jong chihje ahet ding ahi; Thil hekhen them mi chu phoh le chun Hetna aneibe cheh ding ahiye.
Apa pumhat’a noa, Anu delmangpa chu Jum le jachat konna Mi chapa kiti chu ahi.
Kachapa, hilchahna na-ngai jong ngan lang, Het nan jong ipi aseibe nah lai ding ham donda tan.
Mi chavai hettohsah a pang chun Thu adih a kitan jeng jong tot nan aneiyin, Hitobang hin migilouvin Akamsungin themmona akival lhumin akimom jie.
Kivohna ding mol hi mi chavaiho dia kisem ahin, Tungtun jep peh kiti jong hi mi-ngol ho kibolna ahi.
Ju kiti hi mi dai chavaiya pang ahin, Khamna thei kiti jong hi kinah kibaona tah ahibouve. Hijeh chun koi koi hijongleh Khamna theiya lop’a chu miching ahipoi.
Lengpa lungsat akigindol hi Sakei bahkai ngih del dul kiging tobang ahin, Hijeh chun koi hileh lengpa phin lung hanga chun Ahinkho achanlo tei ding ahi.
Kinah kibaona kikhin kang ding hi Min ajabolna theijoh ahin, Hijeh chun koi hijongleh Mi-ngol kiti tapou chu mitoh kina kibaoji ahi.
Nipi laila abeipai ding ahitan Mi thasen la lou akai hih laiye; Thasepan chang-at ding ahol ding, Mu’la amulou hel ding ahi.
Mihem lung gil’a thil ngaito hi Twi thuh tah tobang ahin, Ahivanginla thil hekhen them mihemin Hitobanga thuh jong chu twi thal’a athaldoh ding ahi.
Mihem tamtah hin ama ama kitahna jeng aphonguvin, Ahinla mikitah mong mong kon amudoh ding ham?
Ama chu midih lungthim keh louva vahle pa chu ahi, Ama nunga achapate jeng jong nun nom hen!
Athutanna laltouna tou lengpan Amit vet’in thilse jouse pum kijap bangin ajap dohjie.
Mihem koiham, “Keiman kalungthim kasutheng tai, Hijeh chun kachonsetna konin kathenge,” tia seithei ding?
Thilgih tena dihlou le Thil te-na dihlou chu Hoiya hoijoh chu ahivangin Pakai din thet umtah tah gel ahilhone.
Naosen jengin jong achaloh aumchan in Ama chu itobang mi ahi aseidoh jin, Ama chun athilbol chu ipi hijongleh Adih ham atheng ham ti aseidoh theiye.
Khojahna nabeng hihen lang Khomuna mit hijongleh, ani nia Pakai semsa ahilhone.
Ihmut ding mai thanom hih hel’in, Achutilouva ahileh navaichat lo ding ahi; Namit teni hasah-in lang ven, Chutileh nangman anneh neng jeng junga nanei ding ahi.
Thilchoa pangpan, “Aphapoi, aphapoi,” atin, Ama chu achemang tengleh ahoitho lhehjie.
Sana jong aumin, song manlu tah jong aum nai; Ahivangin hetna neipa kamsung chu sana pahjem abange.
Het phahlou mi koma thilmana kitungsa mipa chu Aponsil jouse kilahpeh jenga! Hetphah lou mite dinga Hitobanga mihem chu kiman jeng theiya ong!
Mi abang khat’in lhep lhah a kimu changlhah chu Atuichom deh bangin agel’in, Ahinla phat chom khat jouteng Akamsunga song chang tobang jeng aumjie.
Min phatea thu amop hat jeh-a thil hijat kigong ahin, Ching theitah a kilamkaina jeh a gal kisat ahibouve.
Houlimdua chun thuguh jouse geiya aseidohji ahin, Hijeh chun angol ngol’a thuseipa chu kivoppi dan.
Koi hileh anu le apa gaosap chan chu Muthim lhangkhal kiheh lah a athaomei kimut mitpeh ding ahi.
Apatna kinothe thua kimu gou chu Achaina lam tengleh phatthei kiboh lou ding ahi.
“Keiman thilse chu lethuh nange,” tin seidan; Pakai ngah le chun aman napanhu nante.
Thilgih te-na adihlouva kibol chu Pakai dinga thet umtah thil ahi; Hitobang hin Thil asao achom te-na moljol dihlou jong aphapoi.
Pakai thusah a mihem khat’in akal asot thei ahin, Chuti ahileh mihemin achamtah a achotna ding iti akihet khen ding ham?
Photlot louva, “Hiche hi thil theng ahi,” tia kisei chu Kipalna thei thang kikam tobang ahin; Hiche hin kitep’a’-kigahna chu Aphondoh mai mai ahibouve.
Lengpa chingtheiyin migiloute Puma kijap bangin ajap doh jin, Amaho gitlouna chu Achunga velkol kipei bangin akipeisah jie.
Mihem lhagao hi Pakai thaomei vah ahin, Hijeh chun mihem lung laigil aholsoh keijie.
Tahsan nale kitahnan lengpa ahinso ahin, Alaltouna jeng jong adihnan ahendet ahibouve.
Gollhang ho loupina chu Athahat’u ahin, Tehse ho mel-hoina vang chu Asamkan’u hi ahiye.
Thilse dinga akijepna maha chu damdoi phatah ahin, Akijep chah teng asung laigil geiyin asutheng jie.
Lengpa lungthim hi twi lonna lui dung tobang ahin, Pakai khut’a um jing ahi; Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Adeilam lama aheile thei ahiye.
Mihemin alamlhah lam lam chu Amitmun adihsah soh keiyin, Ahinla Pakaiyin vang Alungthim joh atetohji ahibouve.
Kilhaina gantha sanga jong Adih bol’a thu adih-a tan ding hi Pakai dinga jong Gamchenga santhei joh ahi.
Mittol let lut’a kiletsah lungthim vop, Migilouten thaomei banga agel’u hi chonset ahi.
Milung ching thilgon jouse chu Abulhingset jin, Koi koi hijongleh Kinle bonga thilbol chu alhasam soh keiye.
Jou le nal’a thu kiseiya lei kileh thema Nei le gou kichom khom chengse chu Twiphon kitol le le tobang bep ahin, Thina theitah thang kikamsa tobang ahibouve.
Mihon thudih a tan ding abolnom loujeh-uva Migiloute pumhatna leivui kitheh ngim abahsah diu ahi.
Themmona neipa lamlhah ajang pon, Alung thengpa chonna vang adih jinge.
Numei hanse toh in khat’a chenkhom sangin Chunglam inning koi lai khat’a chen ding aphajoi.
Migilou lhagaovin thilse bou adeiyin, Aheng akomin jong ama mitmun hepina amupoi.
Mi akaleh akalouva tot chavaipa talen akipeh teng Milhamho jengin jong achih lon, Miching jong akihilchah a ahileh Hetna aneibe kit theiye.
Midih chun migilou in amelchih jingin, Migiloute vang chu amangthah dia kisonlha ahiuve.
Koi hileh vaicha genthei aka teng anakol kisip chu Ama jengjong hung kap ding koiman ajah peh lou ding ahiye.
Thilpeh hin lunghan jong adamsah theiyin, Pon noiya nehguh kipe hin lungsatna nasa tah jong aphel lhai.
Thu adih a akitan tengleh Midih chun kipa nan aneiyin, Thilse bol ho dingin vang Hiche chu lung thoina tah ahi.
Mihem koi hileh hetkhen theina lampia kona Lamvaiya vahmangsa chu Mithi ho kikhopna Khoppi sunga akicholji tai.
Koi hileh min alungset ding jeng deiya chu Vaicha jing jeng ding ahin, Koi hijeng jongleh ju du le thao du chu Haodoh jou louhel ding ahi.
Migilou chu midih kilhatdamna ahin, Kitahna bei mijong milungdih kilhatna ahi.
Numei lung phingbe bo leh Lung hang jing jeng toh chen khom sangin Hetphah lou nelgama Chen ding aphajoi.
Michingtah chenna ina chun Nei le gou lutah kikhol aum nan, Ahivanginla hiche jeng jong chu Mi-ngol’in abahgam hel jin ahi.
Koi koi hileh adih lam del’a Mi khotona neipan hinna akimua mi jabol chang ding ahi.
Miching mihat chenna khopi jong atetoh demin, Chujou tengleh kisonna aneiyu kuipi geiyin aloi chimsoh jitai.
Koi hileh kam kihup’a lei umthimsah chu Genthei hesohna jousea kihongdoh ahitai.
Mi kiletsah, mi noise kiti hi Akaleh akalouva mi tot chavaipa kiminvona ahin, Hitobang mi hin Kiletsah tah-in na atongjie.
Mi thase hi aduchat’in athaji ahibouve; Ijeh-inem itileh aman akhut te nin na atohnom poi.
Migilou chu nilhum lhumin thil deichan apangin, Midih-in vang thil ahomin akinung lah ngaipoi.
Migilou kilhaina gantha chu thet umleu ahiya ahileh, Aman gitlouna lungthim pua ahinchoi teng ichan geiya khoh cheh ding hitam!
Jouthua hettohsah a pang ho chu mangthah diu, Thu ngai thempa thusei chu min angai jing ding ahi.
Migilou chu akimoh ngamsah jengin, Ahivangin milungdih chun achonna phatechan akigel toh masah-e.
Chihna hihen, thil hetkhen themna hihen Thuguh kimop themjeh hijongleh Pakai douthei ding aumpoi.
Gal kisat nikhoa manchah dia sakol gonsa kikoi ahin, Ahinla gal jona thei chu Pakaiya konbou ahiye.
Haona tampi sanga jong Minphat kilhenjoh ding ahin, Dangka le sana sanga jong Mi lung lhaina um hi aphajoi.
Mihao jong mivai jong akikhen thei aumpon, Aloi nia asemlhona chu Pakaima ma ahibouve.
Milung ching chun tijatna ahung ding amun, Hijeh chun ama le ama akiseldoh jie; Milham vang chun imalam hepha louvin amano tei teiyin, Hijeh chun genthei athoh lo jin ahi.
Kineosah le Pakai gin jeh a kipaman chu Haona jouse, jabolna chule hinna ahiye.
Ahilou louva chonpa lamlhah a Ling le khao adimset jin, Hitobang ling le khao lah a kihong thempa chu Hichengsea kona jong hi hoidoh tei ding ahi.
Chapang chu achonna dingdola kilomin khou khah-in, Chutileh ateh geiya jong hichu asuhmil lou ding donlouva akoi lou ding ahi.
Mihao chu mivaichate chunga avaihomin, Hijeh chun sumba pa chu abatsah pa soh a pang ahitai.
Koi hileh thu adih louva tanpan Hamset atokhah tei ding, Chujongleh ama chu alunghana mol alap jongleh Amollap chu ama chungma ma a chu ding ahi.
Koi hileh mi mit-ha hoisel’a ve-pa chu Phatthei boh chang ding ahiye; Ijeh-inem itileh aman Aneh ding anneh jeng jong vaicha ahoppeh-e.
Mi akaleh akalouva kisa chu delmangin, Chutileh kinah jong bei ding ahi; Chutengleh kibaona jouse leh Kihousetna jouse jong mang ding ahitai.
Pakaiyin mi alung theng chu angailun, Koi hileh lungsetna thuseiya chun Lengpa jeng jong khu Gol le paiya anei ding ahi.
Pakaiyin hetna hi amit te nia avet lhih jing ahin, Hichea hin Pakaiyin kitahna bei mi chu aleh khupjie.
Mi thasen, “Polama sakei bahkai aume! Kholai dung jenga jong eithalo ding ahi,” ati.
Numei thanghoi nu kamsung hi Kokhuh thuh tah tobang ahin, Pakai lunghanna boldoh mi koi hileh Hiche khuh sunga hi lhalut ding ahi.
Chapang lungthima ngolna hi kikan chah kheh ahin, Amavang agimna dia mol’a akijep tengleh ngolna hi chapanga konin abeijitai.
Ahaona dia mivaicha bol gentheiya, Mihao pehbe chun avaichatlo ding ahi. Thu kipeho leh gihsalna thu kiseiho.
Nana sungin lang miching ho thusei ngaiphan, Chule keima hetna hi nalung gil’a het din gon;
Ajeh chu hicheng hi nangin nalung sunga nachin leh Nangma dinga jong lung nopna hi ding; Hichengpi hi aboncha nakamsunga naseidoh dia nakoileh, Lung lhaina nanei ding ahi.
Chutileh Pakaiya nakison thei ding, Hijeh a chu keiman tunia hi, Nangma heng mong monga Kahetsah nahitai.
Keiman nang dinga hi kiphona le hetna thu Thu som thum kiseisa kajihdoh peh nahilou ham?
Adih le atah chu kavetsah theiya, Chutengleh nahinsol ho koma thudih a nadonbutna ding kati ahiye.
Mivaicha chu chom hih-in, Ama chu avaicha mong mong ahibouve; Ahilou jongleh genthei thohpa chu Thutanna kelkotpi phunga noigoi din got dan.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amaho ding aseipeh a Amaho maigamset miho hinkho amaigamset ding ahi.
Mihem alunghang jing jeng chutoh kigol kijol bol dan, Chujongleh alungsa jing jeng to jong lhon hih-in.
Achutilouva ahileh ama umchan jouse najom lo ding, Namoh johsah a nakihen chah ding kipalna nanei ding ahi.
Thil batman a thilmana kitung ho bang khun Amacham chama thil batmana kitung bang khun umdan.
Peh ding dang imacha neilou nahi jongleh Nanoiya kijam nalupna jalkhun jong pejengin.
Napu napate phusa gol lui laiya gamgi song chu Nangman botdoh loujenin.
Nangin anatohna khut them mi namu khah lou ham? Hitobang mi hi lengpa angsunga bou ding ding, Mi duh dah lou masanga vang Hitobang mi chu ding lou ding ahi.
Milun vaihom khattou toh an nekhom dia natou khom teng, Na-angsunga chu ipi pi kikoiyam phaten melchih-in;
Milop chilput hat mi nahileh Nalol’a chun chemcha kikanbeh jengin.
Vaihompa neh le chah tuitah ho chu ducha hih-in, Ajeh chu anehho chu kijol lhahna jeng anneh ahibouve.
Haona ding mai maiyin na tong hih hel’in, Chule joule jon’a kona haodoh din gel dan.
Hitobanga namu thil chu Namit te nia namupan bep leh abei paijitai; Ajeh chu apet pet’a alhaving keh abang jengin, Vanlam ngan muvanlai bangin alengtou jitai.
Mit vet duh dah louva mi vepa anneh chu nehpeh dan, Aneh le achah tuitah tah jong chu ducha hih-hel’in.
Ajeh chu amapa chu alung sunga Hamlet lut’a phun jeng ahin, Nangma jah a, “Ha neh-in nen lang ha-donin donin,” Atinah vangin alungthim in nadei hihhel’e.
Nangman nanehsa anneh geiya naloh lhaha Lung lhai lhaina thu nasei jouse chu mohseh hi ding ahiye.
Mi-ngol ho jah phahna a thu seidan, Ajeh chu hitobang mi hin nachihna thusei ho isah louvin ngaito get’inte.
Gol lui laiya gamgi song kiphutsa chu botdoh hih-in, Pabei chagate loulai dunga jong va lut dan.
Ajeh chu alhatdampu u thanei tah ahin ahat’e; Lhatdampu hin amaho ding aseipeh a apanpi ding ahi.
Nalung gil’in hilchahna ngaiton lang, Hetna thu kiseiho jong na nan ngaiphan.
Chapang gahna beiyin koi hihhel’in, Nangin mol’in vo jongle chun thiponte;
Nangin ama chu mol’a navoh a ahileh Ahinkho noimigam jon ding chu nahuhing ding ahibouve.
Kachapa, nalungthim achih a ahileh Keijong katha nom lheh ding ahi.
Nakamsunga kona adih naseidoh tengleh Keijong kalhagao kipah ding ahi.
Nalungthim in chonsete thangsetpi hihin, Nilhum lhumin Pakai ging khenchan um jingin.
Dihtah mongin khonunga din kinepna khat aum jinge, Nangma kinepna jong kisumang louhel ding ahinai.
Ngaiyin kachapa, chule ching theiyin; Nalung gil’in lamdih jot ding ngaiton.
Jukham ho lah a jao hihhel’in, Sa neh a lop ho lah a jong jaodan;
Ajeh chu julop le salop chun vaichatna anei ding, Chutengleh alung nguijen juna um’uva ponsil kichom banga mang choma akichom diu ahi.
Nahingpa napa thu ngai jingin, Nanu jong atehset tengle nahsah mon boldan,
Thutah chu kichoh thon kijoh doh dan; Chihna le hilchahna chule hetkhen themna jong kichoh-in.
Midih chu apa nasa tah a kipah thanom ding ahin, Chapa chingtah kihinpa jong achunga kipah ding ahi.
Nanu le napa kipa tha nomsah jingin, Nahingnu nanu chu kipa sah jing jengin.
Kachapa, nalung neihetsah-in lang, Kaum chan kakhan chan hi namit te nin vephan.
Ajeh chu notinu hi kokhuh thuh tah tobang ahin, Numei jonva le jong chu twikul kichitah tobang ahi.
Hitobang numei chu Gucha michom ding bangin achang pang len; Chutengleh pasal lah a jong Kitahna bei michavai apunsah sah jenge.
Koiham ada a pang? Koiham ahesoh gentheiya? Koiham mi to kina a? Koiham akiphin? Ajeh beiya mapua koiham? Koiham mitchang sankei kuiya umah?
Hitobang miho chu juphunga tou tou ho, Ju-ning le ju-ning kihal du ho ahiuve.
Juchih chu asankei kui tengleh vejong ve hih-in, Khonsunga akhu akituncheng chung tengleh Nal heova akithol lhah vangin Namit’in jong vetdan.
Ajona lam tengleh gul’in mi achuh a nachuh a, Gulsumin mi achuh bang banga nachuh ding ahi.
Namit te nia thil kidang dang namu ding, Nalung gil’a jong akaleh leh a thil nagel ding ahi.
Nangma jeng jong twikhanglen lailunga kijam ho banga Nakijam den a nalup den ding; Kong innei chunga khom kitungdoh chunga lumpa banga Nalup den jeng ding ahi.
“Hite ho hin eivotauve,” natia, “Ahivangin eimavo pouve; Amahon eivoh nah vangun anatlam kahepoi. Kathodoh teng kaholbe kit nah nalai ding ahi,” nati ding ahiye.
Migiloute umchan thangse hih-in Hitobang miho chutoh kivop ding jong gel dan;
Ajeh chu alung gil’uvin thilse jeng agel’un, Akamsung uvin jong joulhepna jeng aseiyuve.
Chihna a kona in kisadoh ahin, chule hetkhen them jeh a kiphut detthei ahiye.
Chutengleh hetna a kona insung dan jouse Adimset’a thil manlu tah tah le lung lhai lhaina haona kidipsoh ahi.
Miching chu mi thahat sangin ahatjon, Hetna nei mi jong chu athaneipa sangin ahatjoi.
Ajeh chu lungthim thema gal kisat thei ahin, Thumop them atama ahileh gal akijouve.
Chihna hi mi-ngol din asang behseh jengin, Thutanna kelkot phung dunga jong apaodoh poi.
Mi koi hileh thilse boldia kigoa chu Jou le nal bolpa kiti ding ahi.
Ngolna a kona thil kigong hi chonset ahin, Mihemte dinga mi tot chavaile pa jong thet umtah ahi.
Kidoupin nahin phah nikhoa nalung lhah a ahileh Nangman tha lhomna nanei bep ding ahi.
Thina lam jona kijot ho khu huhdoh loiyin, Min atha gamna dinga kipal lhuho jong kaidingin.

Nangman, “Vetan, keihon hiche hi kahepouve,” natin, Mi lungthim khol chil’a tetoh ama hilou ham? Nalhagao ve-lhi jinga ching jingpan Hiche hi ahet jing jeng hilou ham? Hichepa hin mihem chu Anatoh dungjui cheh a alethuh ding hilou ham?
Kachapa, khoiju donin atuiye; Khoiphanga hung va-lha khoiju hi lehle chun alhume.
Chihna kiti jong nalhagao dinga Hitobangma chu ahi, ti kihet’in; Chihna chu namukhah a ahileh Khonunga phachom ding ahi; Chutengleh nakinepna chu Kipaidoh louhel ding ahitai.
Migilou bangin, midih invel dunga chang pangle hih-in, Midihpa in jong suhset peh din go hihhel’in.
Ajeh chu midih hi vei sagi jen lhuta jongleh Akithou kit theiye; Amavang migiloute hi Hamsetna ahung lhun teng akhup athal’a ale jeng ahi.
Namelma akipal lhuh teng kipah loujen in, Ama chun kise-lhuhna anei teng jongleh nalungthim in kipah thanomhih-in.
Achutilouleh Pakaiyin mudoh get’in tin, Lung himona anei ding ahiye; Hijeh chun akoma konin Pakai lunghanna chu heimang jon.
Thilse bolte jeh chun nang le nang kisih hih-in, Chujongleh migiloute jong aumchanu thangset dan.
Ajeh chu migilou din khonung thu ahahsan, Migiloute thaomei kimut mit peh ding ahi.
Kachapa, Pakai le lengpa gingin, Koijoh hilhon jongleh athu ngailouvin koidan.
Ajeh chu amania kona hi Hetman louva hahsatna hung lhung jeng ding, Pakai le lengpa a kona hung lhung ding Manthahna chu itobang ahiding kon ija ahet ding ham?
Hichengse jong hi miching ho thuseima ahicheh-e. Thutan na langneina neiding hi Thilpha ahipoi.
Migilou jah a, “Nangin themmona naneipoi,” tia chu Mitin vaipin agaosap’a, namtin vaipin ahot ding ahi.
Migilou phohsal’a pang vang chu Kipah thanoma um ding ahiye; Hitobang miho chunga chu Phatthei bohna hung um ding ahi.
Thu kitoh chet’a donbut thei chun Kideitoa kibeng chopna aboldoh ahi.
Polama natoh ding chan kigonin lang, Loulaiya nakigotna ding abonchan gosoh keiyin; Chujou teng chuleh Na in ding kisah pantan.
Ajeh beiyin naheng nakom dounan hettohsah-in pan dan, Nakam sungin jong lhep lhahna thu seida tan.
Mijah a jong, “Aman eibolna bang banga Kenjong ama kabol ding ahi; Hiche mihem khun abol banga Kalethuh ding ahi,” tin sei hih-in.
Keiman mi thase loulai kahin ho pan, Lungthimbei mi khat lengpilei kaho pai;
Hichea hin vetan aloulai apumpin lingle khao akhulsoh tai, Atol jeng jong linghem adimset jengin, Apala song kise jong chu Achimsoh hel tai.
Hichu kenjong kamudoh phat’in kagel leh, Hiche kamudoh a kon hin kihilna khat kaneiye.
“Ihmut mai mai, kicholdo ding mai mai, Khut teni kitumsuiya kicholdo ding,” kati.
Hitobanga kona hi gucha michomin mi adel khum banga Vaichat nan nahindel khuma, Manchah kichoiya nadel khumpa banga Kel le chah nathoh ding ahitai.
Hichengse jong hi Solomon thuchih jeng ahiuvin, aboncha hi Judah lengpa Hezekiah khang laiya miten anajih dohson kit’u ahiye.
Thil ho sel ding hi Pathen loupina ahin, Thil ho holdoh ding kiti hi lengte loupina ahi.
Vanmun jouse hasana asana, Leiset athuh a athuh bang hin, Lengte lungthim jeng jong Holdoh jou ahinai saipoi.
Dangka a konin a-eh chengse ladoh jengin, Thih-khengpan bel a khen ding thil anei nai.
Lengpa angsunga konin Migilou chu puidoh jengin, Chutileh lengpa laltouna Thudih tousot thei ding kiphutdet ding ahi.
Nacham chamin lengpa angsunga vahlut hih-in, Chujongle milen angsunga jong ding hih hel’in;
Ajeh chu, “Hikoma hung kaltouvo,” tia Min nakou masah ding thilphajo ahi; Milen milal umna icham chama Nailut hen hun sanga chu.
Namit’a namuphah chan Kin le bongin kihehna in’a polut hih-in; Ajeh chu achaina tengleh ipi nabolna ding ham? Ijemtin naheng nakomin najumso taleh,
Nachung chang thu chu Naheng nakompa chutoh achangin kihoupin; Midang dinga thuguh kiti chu Seidoh son ding ngaito dan.
Achutilouva ahileh naseidoh a ajapha khat chun, Nangma jumso na dinga ahinpoh ding ahi; Chutengleh nangma minset chu Achaina beiya umden ding ahitai.
Kitoh chet’a kiseidoh thu chu Dangka a kigol sana tum tobang ahiye.
Nabeng sung geh a ngai jingpa dingin, Chingtah a kiphona hi sana kol le sana pahjem tobanga hoi ahiye.
Sottolle kitahna neitah sol khapa din sottolle chu Chang-at laiya buhbang dapjen tobang ahiye; Hitobang sottolle hin Asol’a apupa lhagao lungthim ahinsah hoi hoijie.
Thilpeh ding kiletsah tah a kitep ta a pelou pachu Meilhang jinglei loiya hui nunga go julou tobang ahi.
Thoh hat tah a akibol leh vaihom khat jong kithu nun intin, O-nem heova thu kisei chun gu le chang jong anemsah thei ahi.
Nangman khoiju nato khah a ahileh Nachim bep kidon jon, Achutilouva ahileh chim behseh jengin natin, Akhonna leh naloh lhah lo ding ahi.
Naheng nakom insunga mohlut lut behseh dan, Achutilou leh nathei chimlon tin nahotlo ding ahi.
Mihem jouva aheng akom hehna hettohsah a panga chu Galsat ding mi koukhom tobang, chemjam tobang, thalchang hemtah tobang ahibouve.
Genthei hesoh pet’a kitahna bei mi tahsana kisonna nei hi, Ha phalou ham, keng phalou tol chonnal jeng jeng ham tobang ahiye.
Mi lung hesoh pet’a la sa a chu Vandel adap nikhoa mi ponsil lahpeh tobang ahi.
Namelma chu agil akel leh aneh ding changlhah pen, Chule adang achah a ahijongleh adon ding twi pen.
Ajeh chu hiti hin bolpeh le chun Alujanga mei-am sungkhumpeh nahi ding ahin; Natoh phatman chu Pakaiyin kipaman napeh ding ahi.
Sahlam khojuiyin go ajuhsah jin, Mi ache nungle seisea chun lung himon mi avejie.
Numei hanse toh in khat’a chenkhom sangin, Intingvum aningkoi lai khat’a chang chen aphajoi.
Gamla tah a kona thupha hung kipolut chu Mi adangchah pet tah a twidapjen kidonsah tobang ahi.
Migilou masanga pansatna ding lampi semdoh peh midih chu Twineh putna twinah le bonsan londohna twikun tobang ahi.
Khoiju tamtah don ding jong aphapon, Thu chavai tampi sei ding jong aphapoi.
Ama le ama kitim joulou mihem chu Achimsa khopi, apal jouse kivolhua kida lha bep ahi.
Nipi laiya buhbang lhah ding akilomlou, Chang-at laiya gojuh ding akilomlou bangin, Mi-ngol jong ja tah a bol ding hi Akilompon akitoh theipoi.
Inva kichao hat bang leh, Pelpalep lengle le banga Ajeh beiya kigaosapna chu Hung gui lhung louhel ding ahi.
