Sakol dinga ajepna akisempeh a Sangan dinga kamdal akisempeh banga, Mi-ngol tungtun jepna dinga Moljol kisempeh ahiye.
Mi-ngol chu angol dungjuiyin donbut dan, Achutilouva ahileh nang jong ama tobang nahi ding ahi.
Mi-ngol chu angolna bangin seipeh le chun, Akhonna leh ama chang mitmua kichihsah bep ding ahi.
Mi-ngol khut’a thu thotle pa chun, Akeng akitanboh a manna twi don’a adonkhah ahitai.
Mi-ngol kamsunga thuchih kisei chu, Mihem akeng kibai, kimoh khaibep ahi.
Mi-ngol jatah a bol’a chu Songsena boma songchang khitdet den tobang bep ahi.
Mi-ngol ho kamsunga thuchih kisei chu, Jukhampa khut phang lingin adotpai tobang ahi.
Mi-ngol ham jukham ham kithalah a chu Mi jouse moh kap khah khah thalpi kappa tobang ahibouve.
Mi-ngol angol thu velsei seipa chu Aloh lhahsa nungjot kit uicha tobang ahi.
Nangin mihem ama le ama kichang chihsah namum? Hitobang mihem sangin mi-ngol din kinep aumjoi.
Mi thasen, “Lamlen a sakei bahkai aumbouve! Kholai dunga jong sakei bahkai aume !” atijie.
Kotpi abil-hom sunga akipeile le bangin, Mi thase jong ajalkhun sunga akilih le lei.
Mi thasen abukong sung asoh jin, Akhut chu akamsung geiya nung dop lut ding jong atha abeipai jie.
Pasal sagin kitoh tah a mi adonbut thei sangin, Mi-ngol chu ama changseh mit mun akichihsah joi.
Akin louhel’a kinahna a kichihsah pa chu Uicha lhaile abilkol te nia tuh tang ding goa tobang ahi
Mi-ngol banga aheng akom meise lokhuma, Thal pia kap jenga, thina theiya puilut jenga chu
Aheng akoma joulhep’a lhemlha a pang ahin, “Keima atot’a kahipoi,” tin aseiye.
Thing ti ding abei teng mei amiji bangin, Kithim houna abei tengleh kinah jong abeiji tai.
Vutsa lah a song meihol kikoi bang leh Meilhum sunga thinggo kitih bangin Mito kinah a ponthopa chun Kibaona akondoh sah jeng jenge.
Mi nabenga thuguh thimsei hol hoi chu Anneh tuisel tobangin akihen, Mihem tahsa alungsung Laigil sung lampeh a alut lhumjie.
Lungthim gilouva muh tuisel sui mi chu, Phatvet maiya leibel kitomjol sel tobang ahi.
Mi hotbol jinga akamsunga seidoh loupa, Alungthim sunga lhep lhahna jeng ko dimset chu.
Lungset hepi tah banga thu asei teng jongleh Hitobang mihem chu tahsan dan: Ajeh chu hitobang mihem lungthima hin Thet umtah tah thil sagi jen achenge:
Mi alep bolna chu akikhu khum nah nah vangin, Houbung sunga agitlouna kiphong-jal ding ahibouve.
Koi hileh mi lhahna dia khuh laiya chu Amajoh lhalut ding, Koi hijongleh songtum tanga chu Asongtum tah ama henga hung kitang lut ding ahi.
Thujouva seina hakat leiguiyin Mi agentheisah ho chu ahot bol kit nalaiyin, Jou jou jeng seiya kamsung chun Manthah thahna jeng aboldoh jie.
Jing nikhoa dingin keiletsah ham hoitho bol dan. Ajeh chu itobang nikho ahung lhun ding nahepoi.
Nakamsunga nakivahchoi sangin Midang joh kivahchoi sah jon; Nang le nang nakama nakivahchoi sangin, Hetphahlou kholgam mi kivahchoisah jon.
Song hi agih a gih ahin, Neldi jeng jong agih lheh-e: Ahivanginla mi-ngol lungsatna chu Song le neldi sangin jong agihsa nalaiye.
Lungsat hi gilou tah ahin, Lunghan hinla mi achup den jie: Hoi hileh koiham Kithangsetna masanga pang jou ding chu?
Guhthima kilungset sangin Lhang phonga kiphosal aphajoi.
Gol phatah-in mi amavona chu kitahna jeh ahin, Melman mi abengchop vang chu kilhep lhahna ahibouve.
Mi a-oivasa din khoiju jeng jong lohso aumin, Agilkel dingin vang ankha jousce jong alhum abange.
Ainsunga kona vahmang mihem chu Abusunga kona leng mang vacha tobang ahi.
Thao le gimnamtuiyin mi lungthim akipasah jin, Gentheina vang hin mi lhagao anoi gep pai ahitai.
Nagol le napa gol chu dalha loujenin. Nahamset nikhon jong nasopipa insunga chedan; Gamla tah a um penpi sopipa sangin Nailama um hengle kom aphachom joi.
Kachapa, ching theiyin lang kalungthim kipa sah jingin. Chutileh eiphohsal pa jong kadonbut thei ding ahi.
Milung chingin thilse hung lhung ding ahemasan, Ama le ama akiseldoh theiye; Milham khopho lou vang chun amano tei teiyin, Genthei hesoh athoh lo jin ahi.
Het phahlou mi koma thilmana kitungsa mipa chu Aponsil jouse kilahpeh jenga! Hetphah lou mite dinga Hitobang mihem chu kimat jeng thei hiya ham!
Jingpi tah a thouva othongje jua Aheng akom phatthei boh a chu agaosap’a kila ding ahi.
Nilhum keiya tang louhel’a go ajuh juh jeng khu Numei lung phingbe bo toh akibangset lhone.
Hitobang numei phoh tang theiya chun Khohui geiya apho tang thei ding ahin, Akhut phang jetlama jong Thaotwi akihamdoh thei ding ahi.
Thih chun thihma anol-hem theiyin, Mihem jong khat’in khat asuhtah thei ahi.
Mi koi hileh theichang phung kiphun Atheiga anetei jin, Chule koi hileh apupa vengtup thema jong Min ajabol teiyin ahi.
Twichung akivet leh mihem maiyin amailim aphondoh bangin, Mihem lung gil’in jong mihem lim aphongdoh-e.
Noimigam le damun hi mithi achim thei lhonpon, Mihem mit teni jong hi thilvet achim lhonpoi.
Khangbel chu dangka lhahjolna ding ahin, Thuh khuh jong sana sonjolna ding ahi; Chule mihem jong hi Vahchoiya aumna laitah a athu kitanji ahi.
Mi-ngol chu lhengkong sunga Suhdun changbong toh goitha jongle chun Angolna kiti laitah chu Ama tahsa a kona potdoh deh louhel ding ahi.
Nakelngoihon ho umdol phatechan hethemin, Chule nabonghon te phaten vephan;
Ajeh chu haona jouse hi aum jing pon ahi; Lallukhuh jong khu akhang khanga umnam?
Hampa apulsoh tengleh Ana ahung nouthah kit jin, Chujongleh molsang dunga Hampa louhing jouse jong kidong khomji ahi.
Kelngoiten naponsil ding natopeh uvin tin, Kelchaten jong loumun khat man kham natopeh diu ahi.
Nadon khamset kelcha noitwi um jing ding, Aboncha chu na-insung vahna ding leh Nu-ngah nakoi chengse Vahna ding lhingset ding ahi.
Min del hih jongleh Migilou chu ajam jam jengin, Midih vang chu Sakei bahkai bangin hang tah-in apange.
Gamsung khat’in suh khel aneiteng leh Achunga vaihom ding atam lheh jengjin, Ahivanginla gamsung kipohna aumsot’a achesotna ding hi Thil hekhen them le hetna nei mihem angaiye.
Migilou vaichate bolgentheipa chu Go bah lha tobang ahin, imacha khen aneiji poi.
Danthu nit ho vangin migiloute adou jinge.
Mi engsen thu adih a kitan kiti hi ahepon, Pakai holten vang lhingset’a ahet ahinai.
Lung keh louhel’a lamjot mivaicha chu Akaleh akalouva lamjot mihaopa sangin aphajoi.
Chapa chingtah kiti chu danthu nit pa ahin, Milop ho toh kivoppa vangin apa ajumsoi.
Thilnei akan dia lha a punbe sah pan Mivaichate khotopa manchah dia akhol khompeh ahibouve.
Mi khattouvin danthu ngaina ding akol aheimanga ahileh, Ataona jeng jong chu thet umtah ahibouve.
Koi hileh milungdih lamse lama puiya chu Ama jeng jong ama khuh sunga lhalut ding ahin. Nolnabei mihem vangin Gou phatah alo ding ahi.
Mihao chu ama le ama mit vet’in achingin akigel jin, Ahinla hetkhen themna nei mivaichan amatdoh ding ahi.
Midih hon gol ajo tengleh kipa loupi tah aumjin, Migiloute aletdoh teng vangleh miho akisel le leuve.
Koi hileh asuh khelna selmanga chu Khangtou louhel ding, Amavang asuh khel jouse phongdoh a Donlouva koipan hepina akimu ding ahi.
Phat jousea Pakai ging jingpa chu nun nom hen, Ahin alungthim tahsah pa vang chu hamsetna chu ding ahi.
Mivaicha chunga vaihoma pang migiloupa chu Sakei bahkai kitumlet lut le midel hamthe thu sa vom tobang ahiye.
Thil hetchet themlou vaihoma pangpa chu Mi bolgenthei engse tah-a pang ahi; Koi hijongleh adih louva phatchomna deiloupa vang Ahinkho sot’a hing ding ahi.
Midang khat atha a athisan asojeh a
Lung dettah a lamjotpa chu huhdoh a um ding, Alamjotna lam lama akaleh akalouva chonpa vang kokhuh sunga lhalut ding ahi.
Agam leiset kilhoa tol tuhatpan Neh ding changlhah neng jeng junga aneiya, Phatchomna bei lampia vahkoile pa vangchu Vaichat nan atu ding ahiye.
Mi kitahna neitah chun phattheina anei jing ding, Hao loi chel ding deipa vang talen manlouva umlou ding ahi.
Langneina nei hi thilpha ahipoi; Ahivangin mihemin an kam khat din jong thildih lou abol theiye.
Mi kikhit themin hao ding amasot loiyin, Achunga itobang lhahsamna hung lhung ding ahi ahepoi.
Leileh themlea thusei sangin Mi phoh lha jengpan khonungle lung lhaina mujonte.
Koi hileh apa le anu chomgamset’a, “Hiche hi chonval ahipoi,” tia seipa chu Misumangpa jol le gol akiloipi ahibouve.
Milop chun kinahna asosah jin, Amavang koi hileh Pakaiya ki-ngaipa chu haodoh ding ahi.
Ama le ama lungthima kisong chu mi-ngol ahi; Koi hileh chihna thua vahle vang huhdoh a um ding ahi.
Mi koi hileh vaicha khoto chun lhahsamna anei lou ding, Amavang mit vet’a neilou gaosapna tampi akimu ding ahi.
Migiloute aletdoh tengleh Mihem acham chamin akisel jiuvin; Amaho chu amanthah phat vangleh Adih apungtel tul jeng jie.
Akipho pho vanga angong vaiput-le pa chu Hetman louva boldam mohel’a kisubei ding ahi.
Midih hon vai ahom’uva thaneiya apan tenguleh, Mipi jong akipah tha nom’uvin; Migilouvin vai ahom teng vangleh Mipin hesoh genthei athoh jiuvin ahi.
Chihna ngailupan apa jeng jong akipasah jin, Noti hotoh lengkhom jingpan vang aneijouse asumang jie.
Thu adih a atanjeh-in lengpan Gamsunga chendetna aphutdoh jouvin, Nehguh kilahpan vang Gamsung asuhmang ji ahiye.
Aheng akom lhem chavaile pan vang Akeng te nia akipalna ding thang akikam ahi.
Migilou chu ama thangkama a-ohjin, Midih vangin la asan akipah thanom jie.
Midih chun mivaichate adihnau ahetpeh jin, Migilouvin vang hitobang thil hi ahekhen theipoi.
Mi tot chavaile hon khopi jong meiyin ahalvam jiuvin, Miching hon vang lungsatna jong aheimang theiyui.
Michingin mi-ngol akineipia ahileh Mi-ngol’in alunghan lo jin amoh nuisat jie. Ahivanginla mohseh-in Amoh umthim dehsam poi.
Mi tha thisan so nom pan Nolnabei mi chu ahotbol jin, Chujongleh migiloupan Nolnabei mi chu tha din aholjie.
Mi-ngol’in alunghan pet leh ima jouse aphongdoh jin, Michingin vang thip beh chan aim mangjie.
Vaihoma pang pan thujou kisei angaiya ahileh Ama vaibola pang jouse migilou soh diu ahi.
Mivaicha le mi bolgentheipa kimuto cheh diu ahin, Amit teni lhon vahsah jong Pakai khat ahibouve.
Lengpan mivaichate thu akitoh toh a atanpeh a ahileh, Alaltouna tonsot geiya kiphutdet ding ahi.
Mol’a kijep’a kipho hin chihna apodoh theiyin, Acham chama kilha chapangin vang anu ajumso jie.
Migilouten vai ahom’uva thaneiya apan tenguleh Suh khelna apungtel tul jin ahi; Amavang midih hon Migilouho mansuh amu diu ahi.
Nachapa gahchah le chun natha-ol ding, Aman nalungthim akipasah ding ahi.
Gaothu kiseina louva mipi amangthah jin, Amavang koi hileh danthu nitpa chu anun nom ahi.
Thu cheng keoseh-in soh chu akituh chah joupoi; Ajeh chu aman ahetnah vangin akhohsah poi.
Ngai kham louhel’a thusei mihem namu khah tah em? Hitobang mi sang hin mi-ngol din kinepna aumjoi.
Min asohpa chu aneocha lhah a hoithona tah a abol leh, Akhon khonna ama gou loh a apan akimudoh jin ahi.
Milungsa be bon kinahna asosah jin, Langhan jenga kipe mihemin jong suh kbel tampi aneiye.
Mihem chu kiletsah nan asuhnem ahin, Hijeh a chu koi hileh alungthima kineosah pan mi jabolna amu ding ahi.
Gucha toh kijol chun ama le ama hinkho jong adeimon, Gaosapna ajah vangin imacha aseidohji poi.
Mihem akigina ahileh kipalna ahin, Pakaiya kisongpa vang chu ahoidoh
Mi tamtah-in vaihompa lungdei ahol’uvin, Ahinla thu adih-a kitan hi Pakaiya hungkon ahibouve.
Midih ho din thu dihlouva tanpa chu thet umtah ahin, Migilou din jong lamdih jenga chepa chu thet umtah ahi.
Massa khoa Jakeh chapa Agur kitipa thuseiho. Agur hin Ith’i-el jah a thu aseiyin, Ith’i-el le Ucal jah a thu aseiye;
Kei hi mihem ti dia mi-ngol tah kahi. Mihem thil hetkhen them bangin kahekhen poi.
Keiman chihna thu kajakha pon. Mithengpa kiti jong kaphong dohhih laiye.

Koiham vana kaldoh a hung kumlha kit chu? Koiham akhut tuma hui kichoi thei-ya? Koiham ponsil’a twi kichun thei? Leiset mong kol kim vel som koi ham? Ama chu amin ipi hiya achapa min jong ipipen ham? nangin nahe mong monge!
Pathen thusei jouse hi adih soh keiye. Akoma kiselte din Pathen chu lum tobang ahi.
Pathenin aseisa athu chu belap dan. Achutilou leh aman naphoa mijou nahilo ding ahi.
Keiman nahenga thil ni kathume, Kathi masangin hite ni hi nei-it peh hihhel’in.
Thujou kisei le jou le nal kiti hi kakoma konin galma tah a tolmang jengin. Vaichatna hihen haona hijongleh neipeh dan, Keiman kaneh khop bep din neivah jingin.
Neng behseh leng ning lhing ing ting Nangma kataitom lo ding nahi; “Pakai kitipa chu koiham?” katilo ding; Vaicha behseh jong leng kaguh chatlo ding, Ka-Pathen min Kasuh thang lo kit ding ahi.
Soh chu apupa henga heh dan, Ajo le aman nagaosap’in tin naje lo ding ahi.
Mi abang bang apute apate jeng jong gaosap ngam aumin, Apite anute geiyin phatthei apepouve.
Amaho mitmua athenga kigel jeng mijong aumun, Ahinla athen lou nauva kona angima aumpouve.
Amitmu’uva kichoi sangloi aumin, Amit dang chunguva chunglam ve loi aumui!
Ahatu’u chemjam hemtah tobang aum’uvin. Aha jouseu chemcha hemtah abang jenge; Amaho hin leiset’a vaichate bahgam din agouvin. Mihem lah a angaicha geova umte bahgam din agouve.
Vot’in chanu ni aneiyin, “Neipen, neipen,” tin, asam lhone; Thil thum achim louhel aumin, Thil lin jong, “Alhing tai.” ati hihhel’e.
Noimigam ahin, nao neilou naobu ahin, Lei set hin twi aducha jing jengin, Meika hin lah “Alhingtai,” tin asei kha hihhel jenge.
Mipa mitche keh den’a, Minu thua nung lou chu phailaiya va-ah ten akilo diu, Mu-thong hon Along aneh diu ahiye.
Kei dingin thil thum hi akidang lheh jenge: Keiman kahet khen thei louhel thil li aume.
Vanlaijol’a muvanlai lenna lampi, Songpi chunga gul kitholna lampi, Twikhanglen kikhangjen jun lah a Kong innei kitolna lampi, chule pasal khat le nu-ngah khat chena lampi.
Notinu chondan chu hiti hi ahiye: An anen, amuh akithehhul loiyin, “Keiman adihlou ima kabolpoi,” tin Asei jin ahi.
Thil thum noiya leiset akithang jin, Thilli noiya vang leiset apang joupoi,
Soh chu leng achan hel’ a, Mi-ngol’in aoiva vaa an aneh a,
Koimacha deilou numeiyin jipa pasal akimudoh a, Soh numeiyin apinu akhel hel phat vang leh!
Leiset chunga thil li neocha cha aumin, Ahivangin hiche thil li hi aching thei lheh jenguve!
Sihmi te hi mihem ahilou vangun ahat lheh uvin, Nipi lai kholum pet leh neh le chah akikhol ngauve;
Boi ho jong hi mihem banga thahat lou ahiuvin, Ahivangin amahon jong songpi lah-a ko akivu’uve.
Khaokho te jong hin leng la anei pouvin, Ahivanginla agol gol’in kitoh chet’in akitol jiuve.
Daidep jong khu nakhut’a namat thei ahin, Ahinla hiche jong hi leng in pia cheng jing ahi.
Thilthum phatah a kijot toh chet aum’uvin. Thil li jong akalseu akitoh del’e.
Sakei bahkai hi sa jouse lah a ahatpen ahin, Imacha masanga anungjam ngaipoi;
Ahpi lah a ahchal kipei deng deng ahin, Kelchal ahin, kel-hon lamkaiyin apangin. Lengpan amite masanga Thu aseiji jong khu ahiye.
Nangma mi-ngol nahiya, nang le nang nakichoi sanga; Thilse ima nagana ahileh, nakhut’in
Ijeh-inem itileh bongnoi imeh meh le Bongnoiha asoh doh jin, Nah-hom akisip sip’a ahileh thisan asoh-in, Lung ihansah sah jenga ahileh kinahna aumjie.
Massa lengpa Lemuel kitipa thusei, anun ana hilna thu aseiho:
Ipi ham kachapa? Ipi ham kasung peng kachapa? ipi mong mong ham Kitepna vanga kahinsa kachapa?
Natha hatna chu numei pedoh hihhel’in. Lengte sumanga pang ho chu nalampi khatcha ot hih-in.
Vo Lemuel, leng ho dinga hitia chon angai ahipoi. Leng ho dia judon angai ahipoi! Vaihoma pang ho dinga jong Khamna thei don angai hilou hel ahi.
Achutilouva ju adon’uva ahileh Thu kiseisa kitansa chu asuhmil diu ahi; Chutengleh bolgentheiya umte dinga Adih nau asuhmil peh theiyu ahitai.
Amangthah dingpa chu khamna thei donsah-in, Lunghesoh genthei behseh ho chu ju donsah temin.
Hitobang chun amaho hin donsah-in lang Avaichat jouseu sumil soh-u leh ong? Chujongleh agenthei ahesoh nau chu Avel’in geldoh kit da hel’uleh.
Koiman adon lou achangseh a kidalha ho khohsah nan, Apaomo thu kisei theilou ho dingin kam kan seipeh-in.
Nakam kan thu seiyin adih-in thu tanin, Mivaichate leh angaichate dihna chu umsah jingin.
Numei jipha tah kon akimudoh jou ding ham? Hitobang numei chu sana pah jem jouse sanga hoijo ahi.
Ajipan jong alungthim in amanu chu kison nan aneiyin, Hijeh’a chu ajipan phatchomna lhasam louhel’a anei ding ahi.
Hitobang numei hin ajipa chu thilpha abolpeh-in, Ahinkho lhum keiyin ajipa setna abolpoi.
Samul le tupat aholjin, Khut chim louvin patse abol’e.
Hitobang numei hi kiveina kong innei tobang ahin, Neh le chah jong gamla tah tah a konin ahinpo lutjie.
Ajan janin akithouvin ainsung mite neh ding agonpeh-in, Insung nu-ngah jouse jong toh ding apejie.
Loumun khat ahol jin achodoh jeng jin, Ama khutsoh mong mongin lengpilei abol’in ahi.
Atai akivei gah teh-in thahat’in apang jengin, Abanjang teni ajegah teh jing jenge.
Hitobang numei hin akiveina anatoh hi Thil phachom ahi, ti ahe jingin; Jan teng jongleh, Athaomei amit khapoi.
Akhut teni leh muikung akisip lhop jingin, Chule akhut te nin patkong kung atuh jing jenge.
Mivaicha te hu-nan akhut alhang jingin, Angaicha a umte jong akithopin ahu jinge.
Hitobang numei hin ainsung dinga Buhbang hung lhah ding jong aging pon. Ainsung mite abonchan Ponsan vamleh-in atomin hijeh chun alung monge.
Hiche numei hin ama le ama din jong ponsil akikhonin, Aponsil jong tupat ponnem le pon sandup ahi.
Khopi kelkot phung jousea ajipa akihesoh keiyin, Gamsung upa ho lah a atou tengleh min ahesoh keiye.
Hitobang numei hin tupat ponnem akhongin, Akhon jou tengleh akijoh jin, Kivei miho henga jong Konggah khao ajoh jin ahi.
Thahat le gunchena hi hiche numeinu dia aponsil tobang ahin, Khonunga phat hung lhung ding chu anuisat theiye.
Ching thei tah-in akam kan thu aseiyin, Mi khotoa mihil din alei jong akilehpel jenge.
Hiche numei hin ainsung mite lamlhahna jouse Phate chan avetoh dim demin, Moh uma thaset man An moh neh ding agopoi.
Hitobang numei hi achate ahung kipat’uvin, Numei nunnom nu ahi, atiuve; Ajipa jengin jong Hitobang numei hi apahcha cha jenge.
“Numei tamtah hin thil phatah tah abol’uvin, Ahivangin nangin amaho nakho khelsoh hel’e,” ati.
Jolseu seuva um hi mi lhep lhahna ahin, Mel-hoi jong hi pannabei ahi; Amavang Pakai ging jing numei hi Pachat chat ding kilom mong ahi.
Hitobang numei chu Akhutsoh atohga peuvin lang, Khopi kelkot phung jousea Hitobang numei hi anatoh jousen vahchoi cheh hen.
